Name: A.Capaldo S.p.A.
Description:
L'Azienda, fu fondata nel 1935 ad Atripalda dove ha conservato la sede legale fino al luglio del 2013, quando la sede legale è stata unificata con la sede operativa di Manocalzati.Nel 1984 la sola sede operativa fu trasferita nel limitrofo territorio del Comune di Manocalzati, in un complesso di nuova costruzione costituito da due grandi capannoni con palazzina uffici ed ampi parcheggi. Successivi ampliamenti realizzati negli anni 1992-1994 e 2000-2001 hanno consentito di raggiungere le dimensioni attuali del complesso che sorge su di un'area di proprietà di circa 80.000 mq. entro la quale insistono costruzioni per oltre 40.000 mq. coperti. La necessità di razionalizzare e potenziare la logistica aziendale suggerì di realizzare un impianto automatizzato: e così negli anni 2006-2009 fu costruito, nel Nucleo Industriale di Avellino - località Santorelli - su di un'area di proprietà di circa 70.000 mq., un insieme di magazzini capaci di ospitare merci per un volume complessivo di mc. 400.000. Il magazzino automatizzato dedicato ai pallet ne ospita ben 40.000 ed è alto 33 mt. Allo stesso modo, negli anni, si è arricchita la gamma merceologica. Alla iniziale e classica "Ferramenta e Colori " ben presto si aggiunsero i " vetri in lastre" ( da tempo dismessi ) e poi altre categorie merceologiche.

Oggi l'Azienda distribuisce :
Ferramenta - utensileria manuale ed elettrica - utensili e prodotti per l'edilizia - idraulica ed accessori da bagno - riscaldamento e ventilazione - materiale elettrico e per illuminazione - prodotti vernicianti ed ausiliari - casalinghi ed accessori per la casa - scaffalature metalliche e mobili da ufficio - giardinaggio e agricoltura - arredi per giardino,balconi e terrazzi -piscine fuori terra

Name: Williams Trade Supplies Ltd
Description:
Independently owned & proud to be different

Founded by Mick Williams in 1972, the company was a traditional local independent merchants for many years. In more recent years, the combination of great prices on the best products backed up by exceptional service has catapulted the company forwards to become a major regional independent and one of the fastest growing merchants in the UK.

Whilst other merchants may offer a confusing mess of price lists and discounts, we simply publish our best trade price, and charge the same price to every trade customer. If we get a deal from a manufacturer, then it is available to all our customers. All we ask is that, if we don’t know you, you are patient whilst we verify your trade status, as we do not deal with retail customers.

In both 2014, 2015 and 2016 the company was recognised by the London Stock Exchange as one of the UK’s 1000 most inspiring businesses, and was listed in Real Business Magazine’s “HOT 100″ fastest growing businesses.

In 2015, the company was acquired from the Williams family by a consortium of management and staff, and most staff are now also shareholders.

We are proud of our commitment to paying a living wage, and to sharing the profits of the business with those who work hard in it.

Name: Ultimate Renewables Supplies
Description:
Ultimate Renewables Supplies is one of the UK's leading design and supply specialists in Heat Pumps, MVHR, PV & Battery Storage, UFH & MCS Umbrella Scheme to installers and merchant partners across the UK.

ABOUT US
We specialise in design and supply of heat pump and renewable energy solutions, with over 50 years of experience. Our team is committed to delivering top-quality service and covers every aspect of the process, from training installers to designing customised systems. 
We take a holistic approach to ensure the entire design and supply process runs smoothly.

OUR BESPOKE TURNKEY DESIGN & SUPPLY SOLUTION
We recognise that every customer has their own set of requirements. To meet those needs, we've teamed up with some of the industry's top manufacturers. This partnership enables us to offer a comprehensive turnkey design and supply solution that is customised to your specific needs. 

OUR TURNKEY PACKAGES INCLUDE:
• Air & ground source heat pumps
• MVHR
• Solar PV & Battery storage
• Underfloor heating (designed for heat pumps or high-temperature systems)
• Thermaskirt (heated skirting boards)
• Fan-coil radiators
• MLCP pipe & press fit fittings
• Pre-insulated underground pipework
• Heat pump working showroom
• Heat pump training
• MCS umbrella scheme

MCS UMBRELLA SCHEME 
We recognise that  not all installers are MCS certified. Our scheme allows  customers to enjoy the benefits of an MCS accredited heat pump installation without the need for you to handle the MCS accreditation & paperwork yourselves.
Our team will manage the process and make it easy for installers to secure the £7500 BUS grant for their clients with our streamlined, hassle-free process.

TRAINING PEOPLE FOR YOUR RENEWABLE FUTURE
Our team of experienced on-site and in-house technical support engineers, are always available to provide support including customised pipe/wiring schematics and our own "easy-to-use" installation manuals.

For more information please do not hesitate to contact us

 Talk to our team today about future-proof electric solutions.

Name: TURBO FONTE SAS
Description:
TURBO FONTE développe et commercialise des poêles à bois ou à granulés, des cheminées et des inserts depuis 44=5 ans près de Bordeaux (33). L’entreprise familiale porte les valeurs de convivialité et de service avec une volonté d’apporter des solutions de chauffage esthétiques, performantes et durables. 

Les produits TURBO FONTE sont conçus au sein du pôle innovation à Pessac qui intègre un bureau de design, un laboratoire et un atelier de prototypage. Pour sa fabrication, TURBO FONTE doit faire appel au savoir-faire hyper spécialisé de ses partenaires exclusifs européens qui perpétuent avec précision, qualité et maîtrise les gestes des artisans ouvriers, qu’ils soient en France (Alsace, Ardennes, Charentes) et en Europe.

TURBO FONTE s’engage à mettre sur le marché des appareils écologiques dont la conception répond à une charte de qualité exigeante en termes de rendement énergétique et de performance. Tous les poêles TURBO FONTE sont éligibles ECODESIGN 2022.

Le succès de TURBO FONTE s’appuie sur un réseau de concessionnaires, les relais sur le terrain pour accompagner les clients dans leur choix du combustible le plus adapté : BOIS, GRANULÉS OU GAZ. Mais, c’est surtout une longue histoire de relations humaines, de véritables ambassadeurs de la marque qui sont tous passionnés et amoureux du design et des produits innovants.

TURBO FONTE a été élue marque préférée par les professionnels en 2021 sur 4 critères : qualité produit, catalogues, SAV et qualité de la relation fournisseur. 

TURBO FONTE  se distingue une nouvelle fois en figurant dans le palmarès Capital des meilleures enseignes 2025.  Avec une note de 8,04/10 dans la catégorie « Équipement de la maison, magasins de cheminées et poêles à bois », l'entreprise confirme son engagement envers la qualité de service. 

Rejoignez-nous !

Name: Sipafer SpA
Description:
"Il futuro appartiene a coloro che credono nella bellezza dei propri sogni" E. Roosevelt

…e noi 45 anni fa abbiamo intrapreso il cammino verso il nostro “sogno”! 
Nata nel 1978 come una piccola attività, la "Ferramenta e Colori di Silvio Passalacqua", oggi la Sipafer SPA è il primo distributore di materiali per ferramenta, edilizia e idraulica in Sicilia e Calabria. Con 110 persone nel suo team di lavoro, serve 4 regioni, conta 50.000 mq di magazzino e 1000 kw di energia pulita sviluppati con il nuovo impianto fotovoltaico. 
La serietà che ci viene riconosciuta dal mercato, unita all’ottimo rapporto qualità/prezzo e al ricco assortimento del catalogo prodotti, ci ha consentito di instaurare rapporti solidi con i nostri clienti, grazie anche ad una rete vendita affidabile e professionale.

Il nostro AD Silvio Passalacqua, con l'irrefrenabile passione e l’entusiasmo che lo contraddistinguono, è ancora una volta in prima linea per fare della Sipafer SpA un punto di riferimento del settore e proiettarla verso nuovi ed esaltanti traguardi.

Name: Axenergie
Description:
Axenergie installation et entretien de votre chauffage

Pour votre tranquillité et votre sécurité faites confiance aux entreprises qualifiées du réseau Axenergie, dont la vocation est l’efficacité énergétique pour :

   - la maintenance de votre chauffage (chaudière gaz fioul ou bois, pompe à chaleur, poêle à granulé)
   - l’entretien de votre installation de chauffage (avec ou sans contrat d’entretien),
   - le dépannage de votre chaudière,
   - l’installation ou le remplacement de votre chaudière gaz fioul ou bois.

Axenergie votre plombier chauffagiste qualifié et indépendant proche de chez vous, pour le choix, l’entretien, la réparation, le SAV, le dépannage ou le remplacement de votre chaudière (gaz fioul ou bois), pompe à chaleur, chauffe-eau, thermostat et poêle à granulé

Axenergie   est   le   premier   réseau   national coopératif regroupant une centaine d'entreprises artisanales de proximité spécialisées dans l’installation, l'entretien, la maintenance et la réparation d'appareils de chauffage, de climatisation et de production d'eau chaude fonctionnant avec toutes les énergies, y compris les énergies renouvelables. 
Le réseau regroupe plus de 1 100 techniciens chauffagistes en France. La relation client étant au cœur de la préoccupation du réseau, les techniciens Axenergie apportent des solutions économiques et écoresponsables en adéquation avec les problématiques environnementales actuelles et parfaitement adaptées aux attentes de chacun.

La mission du réseau Axenergie est de mutualiser les moyens et de les mettre à la disposition de ses adhérents pour fidéliser ses clients et en conquérir de nouveaux.

Depuis juin 2011, AXENERGIE est une coopérative ou chacun garde son indépendance tout en bénéficiant des atouts et de la force du collectif.

Name: Simply Water srl
Description:

UN OBIETTIVO, MOLTI MODI PER RAGGIUNGERLO
Per noi, sono i risultati che contano. Per raggiungerli, crediamo che il lavoro vada considerato nelle sue molteplici sfaccettature: formazione, distribuzione, tecnologia, know how, professionalità. E presenza: quello che ci distingue, è che per i nostri clienti, ci siamo sempre.

20 ANNI SONO TANTI, MA ANCHE POCHI!
Siamo nati nel 2001, e 20 anni di esperienza, in un momento di grandi cambiamenti tecnologici, sono una dote importante. Al tempo stesso, ci sentiamo sempre come agli inizi: in questi anni non è mai venuto meno il sincero entusiasmo per il lavoro che facciamo, e il fatto di considerare ogni cliente come il Primo e l’Unico.

UNA SQUADRA A TUA DISPOSIZIONE
Ogni cliente ha ovviamente un suo agente di riferimento, ma noi siamo una SQUADRA, nel vero senso della parola. Sono molto importanti la collaborazione, la formazione continua, la consulenza reciproca: questo fa il nostro lavoro in maniera stimolante, come una sfida e un miglioramento continuo.

Our extensive product range includes electric geysers, solar water heating systems, heat pumps and gas water heaters, all designed to meet modern demands while contributing to South Africa’s energy efficiency and sustainability goals. 

In December 2024, Kwikot entered an exciting new chapter as it became part of Haier, a global leader in cutting-edge technology and product innovation. This acquisition marks a transformative moment for Kwikot, positioning the company to expand its offerings and introduce advanced water-heating technologies to the South African market.  

Our commitment to empowering communities, fostering industry collaboration and driving sustainability remains stronger than ever. With a robust distribution network and dependable after-sales support, Kwikot continues to play a vital role in enhancing everyday living while supporting South Africa’s economic growth and environmental goals. Guided by Haier’s global expertise, we are proud to lead the way in delivering innovative solutions that conserve resources, reduce energy consumption and provide reliable hot water for every home and business. 

Kwikot remains dedicated to its legacy of excellence, bringing everyday comfort and convenience to South Africans while shaping a brighter, more sustainable future. Together, we are powering progress, innovation and trust for generations to come.

Idroexpert S.p.A. oggi conta più di 300 partner Grossisti in tutta Italia, ha il controllo diretto di 38 Punti Vendita e 14 Show Room con un fatturato complessivo superiore a 160 milioni di euro (dati 2018). Tutti i punti vendita sono localizzati in posizioni strategiche nelle seguenti regioni: Lombardia, Veneto, Friuli-Venezia Giulia, Emilia Romagna, Marche e Umbria. Le filiali sono gestite da Coordinatori Commerciali che godono degli stessi parametri di sconto garantiti ai Grossisti Partner, ed in alcuni casi hanno rapporti fattivi e di reciproco e mutuo soccorso.

I partner di Idroexpert S.p.A. con i quali è stata costruita una solida partnership, hanno potuto realizzare grazie a questa alleanza importanti sinergie ed economie di scala di sicuro interesse economico. Il partner Grossista mantiene una incondizionata autonomia sulla propria azienda, e allo stesso tempo Idroexpert S.p.A. è in grado di garantire loro servizi importanti come la realizzazione di un proprio catalogo in formato cartaceo ed elettronico personalizzato con il logo e immagini dell’azienda dell’associato.

La moderna piattaforma informatica di Idroexpert S.p.A. con la possibilità per tutti i tutti i propri Associati di accedere in tempo reale e senza limiti di orari, 24 h al giorno per 365 giorni l’anno, consente al fruitore di avere in tempo reale la disponibilità delle merci giacenti presso le logistiche.

Name: Grossner Trading
Description:
Este o companie cu capital 100% privat, înființată în anul 2017, care s-a impus rapid ca un nume de referință în domeniul importului și distribuției de soluții complete pentru instalații industriale anti-incendiu, termice, sanitare și altele.

Activitatea noastră se concentrează în principal pe zona industrială, oferind soluții complete pentru instalațiile din hale, depozite logistice, malluri și alte spații comerciale. Colaborăm cu peste 500 de parteneri și livrăm produsele noastre pe întreg teritoriul României.

Avantajele pe care le aducem partenerilor noștri includ un stoc consistent, cu o valoare de peste 4 milioane de euro și peste 4000 de tone de țevi de oțel sub presiune, ceea ce ne poziționează printre cei mai mari importatori din România. Importăm direct de la cele mai mari combinate de oțel din Europa și Turcia și oferim game complete pentru instalații industriale de incendiu, termice, gaz/apa.

De asemenea, dispunem de o linie proprie de vopsire în câmp electrostatic și oferim servicii de prefabricare pentru instalații de incendiu și termice, precum tăiere, carotare, sudură și grunduire. Ne mândrim cu prețuri foarte competitive, termene de livrare scurte, ofertare rapidă și flexibilitate maximă în relațiile comerciale cu partenerii noștri.

W naszych magazynach znajduje się około 100 tysięcy pozycji towarowych o różnej specyfice dlatego wprowadziliśmy podział na działy handlowe:

 Hurtownia Techniczna:

 Hurtownia Narzędzi i Spawalnictwa

W firmie ART-METAL wszystkie działania ukierunkowane są na zaspokajanie potrzeb i oczekiwań Klientów dlatego wdrożyliśmy nowoczesne środki pracy oraz rozwiązania organizacyjne, które zostały potwierdzone w 2004 roku Certyfikatem Systemy Zarządzania Jakością według normy ISO 9001-2000. Wyżej wymieniony system podlega procesowi ciągłego doskonalenia oraz corocznej weryfikacji przez przedstawicieli jednostki certyfikującej TUV SUD Polska. Name: Ab Proses Cevre Teknolojileri
Description:
Ülkemizin yakın geçmişinde sektörde yer edinen Ab Proses Su Arıtım Sistemleri 30 senenin tecrübesini bugüne taşıdı. Doğuştan beri yenilikçi yapısını koruyan ve her zaman sektördeki gelişmelere öncülüğü hedefleyen bir kurum olarak hizmetlerine devam etti. Yıllardır her ihtiyaç duyduğunuzda su problemlerinize İdeal çözümleri sunarak ve ideal ekipman ve donanım tedariki sağlayarak yanınızda olduk ve olmaya devam etmekteyiz.

Bugün İdeal, küresel gelişme ihtiyaçlarına cevaben yapısını güçlendirerek yenileniyor. Başarılı geçmişini güçlü bir gelecekle buluşturmak için bir çatı kuruluş olarak yeni bir yapılanma ile karşınızda. AB Proses İdeal’in tecrübesi ışığında sektörün gelişen ihtiyaçlarına cevap sağlamak üzere kuruldu. Sizlere sunduğumuz hizmetleri geliştirdik ve branşında uzman bir yapı oluşturduk.

AB Proses ekipman ve donanım tedarikinde lider olma hedefiyle yola çıkmış bulunmaktadır. Her an yanınızda olmak için bir tık uzağınıza taşınıyoruz. Bundan sonra çevrimiçi hizmetlerimizle de gündeminizde olmak gayesindeyiz. Proje hizmetlerimiz profesyonel kadrolar ve tam performansla devam etmekte.

Name: Emco Corporation Québec
Description:
C’est à la fin des années 50 que EMCO s’installe à Québec, au 840 rue Sainte-Thérèse, bâtisse qui est toujours en place aujourd’hui. 

En 1986, EMCO Québec déménage au 380 rue Morse, une bâtisse dans laquelle nous serons installés jusqu’en 2018. À l’époque, on retrouvait les divisions plomberie, chauffage, ventilation et aqueduc dans la même bâtisse. L’équipe de EMCO Québec comptait environ 35 coéquipiers, ce qui est près de la moitié de l’équipe actuelle. 

C’est en 2017 que le projet du 1507 rue du Chinook se met en branle, lors du FCR  EMCO où on a demandé au directeur de faire croître davantage l'entreprise. C’est à ce moment l’équipe du PC282 a commencé à travailler le projet de déménagement dans une toute nouvelle bâtisse de 50 000 pieds carrés afin d’être en mesure de continuer de grandir. 
La croissance de notre centre de profit dans les dernières années fut exceptionnelle depuis notre arrivée dans Lebourgneuf. Notre équipe compte 65 coéquipiers, la plus grande équipe de la province de Québec. En 2021, nous avons atteint la 3e place au niveau des ventes nationales de tout le réseau de EMCO corporation qui compte + de 350 centres de profit.

For our well service side, we carry Liberty Pumps, Flint & Walling, and an array of other brands to make sure you're never out of water. Our technicians are capable of same-day service in most instances, so we can get your water flowing. 

On the irrigation wing, we're a distributor and installer of Zimmatic by Lindsay linear & pivot machines. Our staff is expertly trained, installing dozens of machines per year, and servicing all brands in the Willamette Valley. 

Speaking of which, in 2023, Saffron Supply won an award from Best of the Willamette Valley! We're award winners, baby!

Saffron Supply is always looking for opportunities to improve for our customers. If you have an inquiry and would like an answer to one of your burning questions, please email Joe@SaffronSupplyCo.com

Name: Midwestern Mechanical
Description:
Midwestern Mechanical is a plumbing, heating, HVAC, and fire protection contracting firm established in 1983 by Dwayne Klarenbeek, who started the business out of his home in Larchwood, Iowa. 

Since its inception, the company has earned a solid reputation for providing superior craftsmanship, design and service in the four-state area and has become a major force in the plumbing and heating industry. 

For over three decades, Midwestern Mechanical has built a stellar reputation for delivering unparalleled quality in plumbing, heating, air conditioning, and fire protection services to residential, commercial, and industrial clients. 

Today, it's a 330-person company with four offices, recognized as a regional leader supporting projects across South Dakota, Iowa, Minnesota, and Nebraska. 

Their locations in Sioux Falls, SD; Rapid City, SD; Spencer, IA; and Sioux City, IA provide the infrastructure to fulfill their commitment to first-class workmanship. 

As of 2024, Midwestern Mechanical became 100% employee-owned through an employee stock ownership program (ESOP). 

The company has also developed one of the largest apprenticeship programs in South Dakota, offering programs in plumbing, HVAC, and fire protection that are certified by the U.S. Department of Labor.

Name: Multitubo India
Description:
MULTITUBO introduces a state-of-the-art range of multilayer piping systems designed for efficiency, durability, and versatility in modern plumbing and heating applications.

Core Features
	1.	Certified Excellence: Europe’s first CE-ETA-certified multilayer pipe system, ensuring top-tier safety and performance.
	2.	Five Connection Technologies:
	•	Metal-Press Fittings: Universal and robust, supporting diameters up to 110 mm.
	•	PPSU-Press Fittings: Lightweight and economical, ideal for smaller projects.
	•	Metal-Push Fittings: Quick, tool-free installation for tight spaces.
	•	PPSU-Push Fittings: Cost-effective, maintaining safety and ease.
	•	Welding Fittings: Highly resistant to corrosion and ideal for harsh conditions.

Why Choose Multitubo?
	•	Flexibility: Fully compatible connections within the same dimension range.
	•	Ease of Installation: Features like inspection windows and modular pre-assembly simplify workflows, reducing time and labor.
	•	Longevity: Made from high-quality materials like PE-RT/AL/PE-RT, tin-plated brass, and stainless steel, ensuring reliability even in demanding environments.

Applications
	•	Tap Water: Hygienic, diffusion-tight systems for clean water delivery.
	•	Radiant Heating & Cooling: Energy-efficient systems with optimized thermal distribution.
	•	Radiator Connections: Seamless integration with specialized fittings and accessories.

Tools & Accessories

Comprehensive kits and essential tools for cutting, pressing, and calibrating pipes, along with accessories for water and heating installations.

The Multitubo Advantage

Combining innovation, durability, and efficiency, Multitubo offers a one-stop solution for professionals, ensuring every installation is strong, safe, and future-ready.

Name: Hidealoo
Description:
Any place. Any space.

Hidealoo is a space-changing foldaway toilet frame that helps optimise bathroom and space utility in homes, hotels, and any living, work or travel space. 

Hidealoo

- Helps maximise bathroom space and utility
- Optimises unused or awkward spaces where a toilet would be beneficial
- Opens up multiple options for adding additional toilets for flexible living 
- Means toilets can be installed discretely, in non-bathroom spaces for convenience: inside cupboards, wardrobes and walls

Our retractable toilet mechanism offers architects, interior designers, space designers, builders and plumbers a versatile option for using space more efficiently and innovatively.

Technical specification
The patented Hidealoo is precision engineered in steel, built to last a lifetime and proudly made in Britain.

It’s designed and tested to British Standards for water pressure and load, taking up to 400kg. To ensure the innovative flexible waste pipe is up to the job, we have tested opening and closing Hidealoo over 250,000 times. If used 15 times a day, that’s the equivalent of 45 years!

Opening and closing can be done with one hand, so it’s easy to use. Hidealoo pivots the pan and locks it in place for use. Unlocking is a simple movement of the door and the toilet can be flushed in any position.

Installation
Hidealoo is simple to install.

It fits any standard wall-hung pan and cistern and comes with fittings to couple to the UK standard mains waste pipe.

Any competent DIYer or professional plumber can install Hidealoo in just a few hours.

Name: Karbonik
Description:
Karbonik wil een positieve bijdrage leveren aan de energietransitie. We zijn het aan de volgende generaties verschuldigd dat we de verwarming van onze gebouwen anders aanpakken dan we lang hebben gedaan. Duurzaam verwarmen begint met goed isoleren. De volgende stap is het elimineren van het gebruik van fossiele brandstoffen voor verwarmen. Voor de korte en middellange termijn betekent dit dat elektriciteit de belangrijkste energiedrager zal worden voor verwarmen. Hierbij is het vanzelfsprekend belangrijk dat deze elektriciteit zo duurzaam mogelijk wordt opgewekt.

Karbonik focust zich op de ontwikkeling, productie en levering van elektrische verwarmingssystemen op basis van koolstof. Vandaar onze naam. Karbonik levert elektrische systemen voor vloer-, plafond- en wandverwarming. Deze zijn ondermeer te zien (en te voelen) bij de WoonWijzerWinkels te Rotterdam en Kerkrade (www.woonwijzerwinkel.nl).

Onze firma is opgericht in 2015 en heeft inmiddels reeds vele gebouwen (kantoren en woningen) voorzien van haar verwarmingssystemen. Karbonik focust zich op de Nederlandse markt maar heeft ook al systemen geleverd in andere West-Europese landen.

We bouwen aan een netwerk van dealers en installatiepartners waarmee we deze markten bedienen. Vanwege onze groei staan we continu open voor nieuwe getalenteerde medewerkers en partners die net als wij gedreven zijn om bij te dragen aan de energietransitie die keihard nodig is om onze planeet ook voor de volgende generaties bewoonbaar te houden.

Wij stropen de mouwen op en zetten samen met jou een duurzame verandering in werking. Door onze kennis van de energiesector en jarenlange praktijkervaring in de infratechniek bij elkaar te brengen in het gasloos verwarmen en verkoelen van jouw woning verhogen we jouw wooncomfort, reduceren we jouw CO2-voetafdruk en zorgen we voor een rendabele investering op lange termijn! Je kunt zowel voor kleine projecten, als grootschalige projecten bij ons terecht.

Ons doel hierbij is om jou volledig te ontzorgen door met je mee te denken in het voortraject, de boringen zelf uit te voeren en de bodemwarmtepomp te installeren. Indien gewenst kunnen we zelfs de installatie voor je monitoren op afstand. Dirbame su įvairaus dydžio ir sudėtingumo inžineriniais projektais ir galime patiekti nuo mažų produktų iki didelių sistemų, nuo standartinių iki specifinių, sukomplektuotų pagal užsakovo poreikius įrenginių, nuo tradicinių, jau įsitvirtinusių iki naujausių technologijų.

Jau daug metų esame daugelio tiekėjų oficialūs įgalioti atstovai Lietuvoje, tad galite gauti tinkamiausią sprendimą ir įrangą už patrauklią kainą ir geriausią popardaviminį aptarnavimą ir servisą iš pirmų rankų.

Pirkdami patalpų mikroklimato sistemas ir komponentus iš mūsų, sėkmingai įgyvendinsite visus inžinerinius ŠVOK projektus, kad ir kurioje srityje jie būtų: pramoninėje, komercinėje ar buitinėje.

Oggi, Idros.art & Bozzola Group S.p.A. è presente capillarmente sul territorio grazie alla presenza di oltre 23 Punti Vendita e 8 Showroom in Veneto, Friuli Venezia Giulia, Emilia-Romagna, Umbria e Lombardia. Name: TEKTES Teknolojik Tesisat Sistemleri Sanayi ve Ticaret A.Ş.
Description:
TEKTES Anonim Şirketi, mekanik tesisat sektöründe yüksek prestije sahip olan ve ileri teknolojiyi temsil eden markaların üstün nitelikli ürünlerini pazarlamak hedefiyle 1995 yılında Ankara’da kuruldu.
Ticari hayatta itibar edinmenin ve bunu sürdürebilmenin ne kadar önemli olduğunun bilinciyle ve sahip olduğumuz birinci sınıf hizmet sunma geleneğiyle 1995’den bu yana faaliyet gösteren firmamız, bu süre içerisinde sektördeki birçok değerli markanın ürünlerini satış programına kattı ve halen de katmaya devam etmektedir.
Tüm bu süre boyunca siz değerli müşterilerimizin ihtiyaçlarına, temsil ettiğimiz kaliteli markalar, müşteri ve insan odaklı bakış açımız, çok yönlü ve rekabetçi ticaret anlayışımız ve nitelikli mühendislik yaklaşımımızla en iyi şekilde cevap verme gayretini sürdürdük.
İhtiyaçların ve teknolojinin hızlı bir değişim içinde olduğu günümüz dünyasına ayak uydurabilmek için, ısıtma, soğutma, sıhhi tesisat, altyapı ve enerji konularındaki mühendislik birikimimiz ve iyi eğitimli uzmanlardan oluşan ekibimiz ile satış öncesi, satış sırası ve satış sonrasındaki tüm müşteri ihtiyaçları için hızlı ve doğru çözümler üreterek, sektörde daima güvenilir ve saygın bir firma olduk.
Kurulduğu günden beri kaliteli tedarikçi olmayı hedefleyen TEKTES’in bu anlayışını, sahip olduğumuz ISO 9001 kalite yönetim sistemi ile de belgeledik.
Bugüne kadar bizden güvenlerini esirgemeyen tüm müşterilerimize, bizi destekleyen bütün dostlarımıza, temsil ettiğimiz markaların yönetici ve çalışanlarına ve birlikte yürüdüğümüz çalışma arkadaşlarımıza teşekkür ederiz.
Gelecekte de yüksek katma değerli hizmet alabileceğiniz güvenilir tedarikçiniz olarak, sektörde yer almaya devam etmek en büyük gayemizdir.
Yeniliklere açık hizmet anlayışımız ve sürekli iyileştirme düsturumuz ile hedefimiz “en iyi” olmaktır.

Name: Frico Deutschland
Description:
Über uns:
Frico ist stolz, energieeffiziente Produkte für ein besseres Raumklima zu liefern. Über unsere Muttergesellschaft Systemair verfügen wir auch über Kenntnisse im Bereich Lüftungs- und Klimatechnik und bieten entsprechende Lösungen an.

Energieeffiziente Produkte für ein angenehmes Raumklima:
Wir bieten ganzheitliche Lösungen, sowohl vollständige Heizsysteme, als auch Produkte für zusätzliches Heizen, die Ihnen dabei helfen, das Raumklima in Läden, Industriegebäuden, Büroräumen, Hotels, Restaurants und Sportanlagen zu regulieren.
Dank unseres Umweltbewusstseins entwickeln wir umweltschonende Produkte. Bei unserer Produktentwicklung konzentrieren wir uns darauf, die größtmögliche Leistung bei niedrigstem Energieverbrauch zu erzielen – ohne Kompromisse bei unseren Kernwerten Vertrauen, Kompetenz und Sorgfalt einzugehen. Die intelligenten Produkte enthalten Steuerungssysteme, die stets dafür sorgen, dass das Gerät nicht mehr Energie als nötig verbraucht.

Name: Heat Wayv
Description:
Heat Wayv is a portfolio of stylish, practical, cost-effective, high-energy space and hot water systems developed for maximum efficiency and powered solely by electricity.

By only replacing the gas boiler with no further physical changes to the incumbent heating system, the appliances can be both quickly and easily installed, or retrofitted by a certified tradesperson, and are fully compatible with all existing heating control systems.

The Heat Wayv product range economically delivers hot water and radiant heat on-demand.

It runs totally silent, is zero carbon in operation, can be installed in the same location as current boilers and is virtually maintenance free.

On-site safety is our top priority and we consider this to be of the utmost importance. You can feel at ease knowing that all necessary safety measures have been taken by our OH&S trained team.

Our commitment to our employees and customers, paired with our unique passion for providing innovative and energy efficient pool heating solutions has been the foundation of our success, and will continue to drive 
Supreme Heating for years to come.

Name: Delbrassine SA
Description:
Qui sommes-nous?
Actifs dans les domaines HVCA, nous cherchons à proposer des solutions énergétiques adaptées à nos clients particuliers et professionnels. 

Notre équipe se charge de concevoir et réaliser tous vos travaux et notre service après-vente, disponible 7j/7, est à votre disposition pour la maintenance de vos installations et les dépannages éventuels.

Leur motivation ? Votre satisfaction!

Quels services proposons-nous?
> Pour les particuliers
Nos équipes accompagnent les particuliers dans leurs choix dans ces différents domaines : installation de chauffage hybride, de chauffage par le sol, à air pulsé, de pompes à chaleur, de chaudières, de climatisation et de sanitaire.

> Pour les professionnels (industries, commerces, entreprises publiques et privées) :
Le choix de l’énergie fossile classique (gaz, électricité, bois, mazout) ou durable, l’accompagnement dans les domaines du refroidissement, de la ventilation, de la distribution gaz, air et eau, du sanitaire, de l’incendie, du développement durable et des pompes à chaleur sont autant de services proposés aux entreprises, commerces et industriels, publics ou privés.

Quels sont nos atouts?
Une équipe solide, des collaborateurs fidèles, des partenaires de qualité, le souci du travail bien fait et des délais respectés constituent les atouts majeurs de notre société.

Avec près d’un siècle d’expérience, nous avons à cœur de proposer à nos clients un service de qualité garanti par les compétences techniques et de sécurité de nos collaborateurs. Le haut niveau de qualification de nos travailleurs ainsi que la formation continue que nous leur proposons sont à mettre en exergue.

En outre, nous assurons un service 365 jours par an. Cette assistance proposée 7j/7 est un élément apprécié de nos clients qui savent que nous répondrons présents en cas d’urgence.

Plus d'infos :

Name: Westcome Heat Exchanger
Description:
Since 2006 Westcome Heat Exchanger has developed and manufactured our product, a patented heat exchanger designed explicit for direct heat exchange between flows, with high viscosity matter (as digestate, sludge).  
Since 2006    

We hold several patents, and our design and new principles of heat exchanging difficult masses as slurry, sludge, biomass etc., has proven itself as a trouble less method, working many installations since 2006.
 
Our invention results in:
- no maintenance, no sealings, no spareparts needed in stock. 
- low pump effect required due to low flow rate and forced stirring.
- very low risk of fouling  due to same cross cut area throughout the channels in the heat exchanger. (No hot and dead zones).
- customizeable sizing and lowest foot print installation on market. 
- highest effiency due to direct heat exchange cold/warm, even with high 
  viscous matter such as sludge/biomass with D.M content.
- no risk of clogging. Channels are larger than piping.

Visit our website for an explanation and walk through of our principles of heat exchanging, explanations, documentation from actual results from working installations etc. 
And ofcourse, do not hesitate to contact us.

Name: SVANSTRÖMS EL & VVS AB
Description:
Svanströms El och VVS AB grundades 2003 av Håkan och Eva Svanström. Grundtanken från dag 1 var att kunna leverera det lilla extra både till privatpersoner och BRF:er/fastighetsägare. Genom åren så har det visat sig vara ett vinnande koncept vilket har gjort detta till ett familjeägt företag med stor genomslagskraft och många tiotusentals nöjda kunder. Nu är det andra generationen som är högst delaktiga i den dagliga driften och i utvecklingen av verksamheten. Vi utför mer än 5000 uppdrag årligen av olika omfattning. Från byte av ett lamputtag till byte av hela undercentraler. Vi har även varit med i statliga upphandlingar och vunnit dom där vi har kunnat leverera samma tänk som till privatägda fastigheter: ekonomiskt försvarbara lösningar som gynnar beställaren. Inget uppdrag är för litet eller för stort för oss - tror du oss inte har vi dokumenterat hela vår resa på YouTube där vi snart är uppe i 20 miljoner visningar. 

Svanströms El och VVS AB sysslar inte med merförsäljning utan vi tänker att en nöjd kund återkommer till oss. I och med att vi har både el och VVS under samma tak kan vi åta oss projekt där ni normalt hade behövt två olika företag så kan vi lösa hela jobbet själva. Utöver detta erbjuder vi jour dygnet runt året om. För när olyckan är framme så vill man hjälp snabbt för att minska på skadorna på fastigheten och egendomen.

Name: Copper for Sustainable Plumbing
Description:
Copper for Sustainable Plumbing is a dynamic and collaborative initiative led by the International Wrought Copper Council, bringing together leading European copper tube manufacturers with a shared commitment to advancing the future of plumbing.

Our vision is rooted in the belief that copper, with its unmatched durability, reliability, and sustainability, is the foundation of modern, resilient infrastructures.

At the core of our mission is a dedication to educating and inspiring not only industry professionals but also consumers and policymakers. Unsere Mission: Für das Gelingen der Energiewende optimieren wir die Beschaffung von qualitativ hochwertiger Haustechnik und fördern den digitalen Handel in der Baubranche.

Unseren Fokus haben wir auf Effizienz und Nachhaltigkeit gelegt. Mit möglichst kurzen Lieferketten in unserem bundesweiten Versandnetzwerk sparen wir Ressourcen. In unserem Gesamtsortiment von über 1 Million Produkten führen wir sowohl moderne Heizsysteme für Erneuerbare Energien als auch alle verfügbaren Ersatzteile für die Instandhaltung bestehender Gebäudetechnik.

Wir können mittlerweile alle renommierten Premium-Marken des deutschen Fachhandels anbieten. Damit haben wir im Bereich Sanitär, Heizung und Klima das größte Online-Sortiment Deutschlands. Neben Heizkörpern gibt es mittlerweile auch Wärmepumpen, Gas-, Öl- und Pelletheizungen, Fußbodenheizungen, Enthärtungsanlagen und Pumpen. Aber auch für Küche und Bad haben wir ein breites Sortiment wie Duschkabinen, Badewannen, Waschbecken, Spülen und viele weitere Vollsortimente der bekanntesten SHK-Hersteller.

Häufig nachgefragte Sortimentsbereiche stehen in mehreren Lagerstätten zur direkten Auslieferung bereit. Alle anderen Artikel werden für unsere Kunden beschafft und schnellstmöglich ausgeliefert.

Die Käsmayr GmbH steht für Qualität, Verlässlichkeit und exzellenten Service – damit jedes Projekt unserer geschätzten Kunden reibungslos läuft.

Name: Superior Tool
Description:
With a company culture that is intensely focused on serving the needs of users of its tools–and 60 years after its founding, Superior continues to be the dependable source for innovative products that make plumbing jobs faster and easier. And, Superior stands behind every tool like no other company—with lifetime guarantees and a commitment to personal telephone service from knowledgeable full-time company representatives. The report cards that retailers have given us prove that all of this is not idle talk: Superior “Makes it Happen.”
---
Originally based in Cleveland, Ohio, Superior Tool Company was founded in 1946 as a distributor of U.S. Government surplus hand tools from World War II. For the next 50 years, Superior manufactured a wide range of products… mostly tubing/pipe tools and hex key wrenches that were sold through hardware distribution.

In the 1980s, hard-goods retailers everywhere began selling Superior’s professional quality tools to a wide range of end-users and professional plumbers.  New products helped drive company growth and earned us the Weatherhead 100 award as one of the fastest-growing companies in Cleveland—among other awards.

In August of 2020 C.H. Hanson purchased Superior Tools and added it to our company’s family of fine brands. Hanson’s dedication to value-based products, outstanding customer service and commitment to innovation fit perfectly with Superior’s efforts.

Wherever possible we embrace U.S. manufacturing instead of foreign made product. We always look for American parts suppliers and product suppliers who can compete and win in the global marketplace. Many of the parts used in our tubing cutters and other products still come from long-term trusted suppliers in the Cleveland area.

For more on our story, please visit our website.

Name: Ultra Compact Limited
Description:
Born from the original company Specific Oil Solutions, which was founded in 2012, Ultra Compact Limited was launched January 2020. The first and without doubt, most important product developed under the Ultra Compact brand to date being the Ultra Compact fuel tank valve, which is protected by International Design Copyright. This unit delivers “safe isolation” by providing isolation to all domestic and light commercial bottom outlet storage tanks as the very first fitting. To complement the Copyrighted valve our business also offers a comprehensive range of fuel tank valve and filter options. This includes three ranges of tank filters which all utilise one common range of plated steel manifold fittings, insomuch as the “Budget”, “Standard” and “Premium” filter ranges. Thus the three filters styles can be mixed and matched to suit any appliance or application. The smallest tank filters in the range are as competitively priced as many mass produced Chinese units, but assembled and tested right here at our base in central England. At the opposite end of the filter spectrum, the largest of our units has a 3/4” BSP outlet, a rating of ten micron and boasts a phenomenal 1090cm2 of internal surface area from its “Spin-on” Ultimate cartridge. In addition to the fuel tank filters, we also offer a range of four in-line wall-mounted, fully reversible units. Again, much like the tank filters, our in-line filters cover domestic, light commercial and small industrial installations right up to 3/4” BSP pipelines. All our products are tested in real time and in real conditions on the Scottish island of Shetland, possibly the harshest conditions available within the U.K. The ethos of the business is one of continuous improvement in search of perfection. Therefore our entire range of products is under constant scrutiny and development. 

We have plans for a number of new products to assist the oil-fired, now termed liquid-fuelled heating industry - watch this space! Thank-you.

Name: Turner Plumbing Co.
Description:
With a legacy spanning over 82 years, Turner Plumbing Company is not just a plumbing service; it's a testament to passion, dedication, and family dreams coming to life. Founded by Louise C. Turner in the late 1930s, the company has evolved into a thriving enterprise under the leadership of Worth Turner, the third-generation owner.

Boasting over 200 years of combined industry experience, our seasoned team, with over 150 years at Turner Plumbing, utilizes cutting-edge technology to deliver optimal plumbing solutions. From Worth's initial commitment to the company, following in the footsteps of his parents Louise and Charles Hollingsworth Turner (Holly), to the present day under the ownership of Buz's daughter Kendal Turner, our journey is one of continuous growth and unwavering dedication.

What began as a dream painted on the side of a truck by Louise has transformed into a thriving family business. Holly's legacy of honest and loyal service laid the foundation for Turner Plumbing's success. Through the years, the Turner family has expanded their expertise, with Carla managing office logistics and finances, Worth overseeing Hollingsworth Showroom, and Kendal taking over the managing role and with the emphasis on managing bathroom and kitchen remodels.

As the current owner and operator, Kendal Turner leads the charge, upholding the values instilled by previous generations. It's the collective effort of our talented team and the unwavering support from our valued customers that has allowed Turner Plumbing to flourish in Northeast Florida, building a legacy synonymous with quality and excellence. 

At Turner Plumbing, we don't just fix pipes; we build lasting relationships with our community—one plumbing solution at a time.

Dünyadaki bütün pazarlarda satılan tüm plakalı eşanjör markaları ile rekabet edebilecek, Tüm çeşitlerdeki eşanjörlerin tedariği ve servis hizmetleri gibi geniş bir ürün ve hizmet yelpazesi olan TEMPUS, müşterilerinin olumlu referansları ile her geçen gün daha çok tercih edilir bir firma olmaktadır.

 

Müşteri memnuniyeti tabanlı çalışma stratejisini kendisine düstur belirlemiş olan TEMPUS, sektöre faydalı olabilmek ve olumlu referanslarını her geçen gün artırmak için çalışmalarına hız kesmeden devam etmektedir.

Name: Chapuis + Zürcher AG
Description:
Unkompliziert, sozial, bodenständig, nah bei den Kunden und mitten in Bern – das zeichnet den Familienbetrieb Chapuis + Zürcher aus. Seit 75 Jahren.

Tradition und Nachhaltigkeit prägen den Sanitär- und Spenglerbetrieb Chapuis + Zürcher in Bern – seit 1947. Damals gründete Otto Chapuis zusammen mit dem Kaufmann Walter Gschwend die Firma Chapuis und Gschwend in Bern. Die Blei- und Gussrohre, mit denen damals Meteor- und Schmutzabwasser abgeleitet wurde, bearbeiteten sie allesamt von Hand. 1961 trat Ernst Zürcher in den Betrieb ein. Er gründete nach dem Tod von Otto Chapuis 1980 zusammen mit Iréne Rüegg-Chapuis die Aktiengesellschaft Chapuis + Zürcher. 2007 übernahmen ihre Söhne Stefan Rüegg und Reto Zürcher den Betrieb. Am 31. Dezember 2019 hat Reto Zürcher die Chapuis + Zürcher AG verlassen und Stefan Rüegg hat die alleinige Geschäftsführung und Kontrolle über die Gesellschaft übernommen. Als Familienunternehmen profitiert die Firma von ihrer Unabhängigkeit und von schnellsten Entscheidungswegen.

Name: Gruppo Delfino
Description:
Delfino è un Consorzio di imprese che opera nel settore idrotermosanitario: una rete nazionale, fondata nel 1976.

Lo scopo del Consorzio è mettere in condivisione esperienze, prodotti, soluzioni e conoscenze tecniche per dare ai propri grossisti idrotermosanitari associati un valore unico e distintivo da offrire ai loro clienti, siano essi professionisti o privati.

Ogni giorno il Consorzio si impegna per migliorare i propri servizi, con una tensione costante alla qualità e all’innovazione. Delfino ricerca e rende disponibili nuove soluzioni per sostenere l’attività e la crescita degli associati.

Uno dei compiti fondamentali del Consorzio Delfino è svolgere il ruolo di Centrale Acquisti, importante facilitatore delle attività organizzative, amministrative e commerciali sia per i consorziati che per le imprese produttrici.

Il Consorzio ed i soci sono organizzati con un modello a rete: operano come un’unica impresa con punti vendita autonomi in sede locale, concentrando le attività che permettono vantaggiose economie di scala.

In Delfino diamo grande valore al rapporto umano: nessuna aggregazione può durare nel tempo senza legami forti tra le persone. Per noi conta ancora “il piacere di stare insieme”.

Name: elson - Plumbing for tomorrow
Description:
- The leading manufacturer providing LEAD FREE Plumbing Solutions

Elson is an Australian owned and operated company since 1993 with our head office based in Sydney Australia. Elson has two distribution centers, located in Sydney and Melbourne.

Elson plumbing products have been designed specifically for the Australian market. We have been manufacturing quality plumbing products since 1999 in our ISO9001 certified factory. We control quality from the raw materials through the manufacturing process to the finished products. This ensures every elson product is of consistent and of the highest quality and meets our strict standards. 
elson - quality without compromise

NCC 2022 Volume Three Clause A5G4 (Plumbing Code of Australia) specifies that copper alloy plumbing products in contact with drinking water must limit the allowable lead content to a weighted average lead content of not more than 0.25%.
Elson set a higher standard and quality benchmark by introducing less than 0.1% Lead Free copper alloy plumbing products in 2016 with the launch of elson PRESS. We have continued to expand our LEAD FREE ranges to include Water Meter Connection Product Range, Hot Water Control and Protection Valves, Pipeline Control Press Ball Valves, and elson innovative Union-fit Ball Valves, as well as elson EPS PEX Water & Gas Plumbing Systems.  

Elson has gained recognition as an INDUSTRY TRUSTED BRAND in Australia. We continue to develop our product ranges, focusing on quality, innovation and technology.

Name: Kermi Duschdesign
Description:
Die Kermi Duschdesign GmbH, ein Unternehmen der Arbonia AG, zählt als international ausgerichteter Produzent zu den führenden Herstellern in ganz Europa. Am Hauptsitz in Niederbayern findet nach wie vor die Fertigung statt. Die Marke steht für einfache  und schnelle Montage, ein außergewöhnliches Serviceangebot, langlebige Qualität "Made in Germany" und natürlich erfrischende und entspannende Duscherlebnisse.

Die erste Duschkabine fertigte Kermi im Jahr 1976, die 15 Millionste konnte 2022 gefeiert werden. Mit seinen hochwertigen Duschkabinen ist Kermi die führende Marke in Europa. 
Kermi Duschdesign bietet eine breite Produktpalette mit nahezu grenzenloser Variantenvielfalt für jeden Anspruch und für jede Badsituation und liefert dabei außergewöhnliche Qualität „Made in Germany“ mit 20 Jahre Nachkaufsicherheit nach Auslauf eines Produktes. Die erfahrene hausinterne Entwicklung, hochwertigste Materialien, eine sorgfältige Verarbeitung und strengste Prüfkriterien sorgen für die besondere Langlebigkeit der Produkte.

Alle Produkte werden streng nach den Kriterien des Universal Design entwickelt, das bedeutet nutzbar ohne Hindernisse und Einschränkungen für alle Generationen. Orientiert an den individuellen Ansprüchen und für jedes Budget. Mit Extrakomfort und anpassbar an jede Raumsituation und persönlichen Geschmack.

Name: MENSA HEATING FRANCE Chauffage infrarouge d’appoint danois
Description:
Hausse des prix de l’énergie ? Facture multipliée par dix ? Engagements envers le plan de sobriété ? 

Notre solution pour les professionnels et les particuliers !

MENSA HEATING FRANCE est le distributeur français des chauffages mobiles infrarouges IMUS, VIREOO et STATIO et du coussin chauffant NATES de la marque danoise MENSA HEATING, qui existent déjà dans 15 pays depuis 14 ans.
Comment MENSA HEATING peut vous aider à sortir de la crise énergétique ?

Grâce à nos appareils :

 Chauffez le corps et pas l’air :

IMUS, VIREOO et STATIO sont les premiers chauffages au monde qui permettent à votre corps de se réchauffer naturellement. 
La lampe infrarouge est intégrée aux appareils au niveau des jambes, car la chaleur monte toujours du bas en haut. Donc, dès que les jambes sont au chaud, la chaleur commence à circuler dans le corps entier. Ainsi, la personne se réchauffé rapidement. 

Cela vous évite de chauffer toute la pièce et permet de faire des économies d’énergie !

 Réduisez votre facture d’énergie en baissant le chauffage :

Nos appareils sont très peu énergivores. En consommant seulement 0,55 kWh, IMUS et VIREOO donnent une chaleur égale à 1,5 kWh. 

Cela veut dire qu’ils ne coûtent que 12 centimes de l’heure.
Comparés aux radiateurs électriques qui consomment 1,5 kWt, nos chauffages consomment 3 fois moins d’énergie.

Ainsi, vous pourrez baisser le chauffage tout en restant au chaud cet hiver. 

RAPPEL : 1 °C de moins = 7 % d’économies d’énergie !

 Ne vous brûlez pas au toucher. Sécurisé pour le corps humain et les animaux grâce à la technologie danoise SAFE TOUCH. 

 Protégeons l’environnement ensemble !
Nous avons réduit de 89 % les émissions de CO2 de nos appareils.

Vous voulez en savoir plus sur nos appareils de chauffage ou faire une commande ? 

Rendez-vous dans notre boutique en ligne : 
https://mensaheating.fr/

Contactez- nous sur :

service.client@mensaheating.com ou par tél. 07 66 47 28 56

Name: Team Duurzaam Installeren  Foundation
Description:
For a large part of the existing housing stock, (hybrid) heat pumps are an important first regret-free step of the renovation solution.

In the Acceleration of the Sustainability of the Built Environment policy programme, the goal is to have one million (hybrid) heat pumps installed in existing buildings by 2030.

For this, the pace has to be increased to more than 100,000 extra installations per year, or 500 extra per day. Installation companies have a key role in realizing this acceleration, together with manufacturers, wholesalers, customers, schools, governments and knowledge organisations. 
To do that, they have to do something fundamentally different.

The consortium, comprising 9 leading dutch installation parties with more than 2 million customers, is joining forces to accelerate the installation rate of (hybrid) heat pumps by 500 per day within 3 years. 

With the solutions, knowledge and expertise gained, acceleration is also created in the rest of the installation sector.

Name: Giacomini Unival
Description:
1985 yılında Yılmaz Boru firması, boru ve Fittings konusunda dünyanın önde gelen şirketleri ile distribütörlük iş birliği yapmak için kurulmuştur. Bu süreç içerisinde Türkiye sanayisine hizmet ederek ülke gelişimine katkıda bulunmuştur. 

2009’a gelindiğinde endüstriyel, HVAC ve yangın alanlarında ülkeye ve dünyaya hizmet etmek ve uluslararası pazarda konusunda bilinen öncü bir firma olma vizyonu çerçevesinde, şirket yapısını bu yönde değiştirmiştir. Bu amaçla da UNİTES markası doğmuştur. 

Unites, alanında dünyanın en büyük üreticisi olan Giacomini ile stratejik ortaklık kurmuştur. 2012’den sonra firma Giacomini Unival olarak dönüşerek, dünyada üretim konusunda söz sahibi olacak bir şekilde yeniden yapılanmıştır.

Üretim yatırımları, yeni ürün gruplarını içerecek şekilde gelişmekte ve ürettiği her ürünü ağırlığı Avrupa ülkeleri olmak üzere dünya pazarına ihraç etmektedir. 
Teknolojik vana ve yangın ürünleri üretimine ve bunlarla ilgili uluslararası yatırımlarını yapmaya devam eden Giacomini Unival, 2019 yılında S.S. İstanbul Mermerciler Küçük Sanayi Sitesi Dilovası içerisinde bulunan 10.000 m2 alana taşınarak üretim ve lojistik faaliyetlerine devam etmektedir.

Faaliyetlerimizi uygulama noktasında ülkemize, çalışanlarımıza, iş ortaklarımıza ve çevreye sürdürülebilir fayda sağlamak azmindeyiz. Müşterilerimizin bizlere duyduğu güven, en büyük sermayemizdir.

Name: J Patrício Metais
Description:
Fundada em meados de 2001, a J Patrício Metais é uma empresa do ramo de comercialização e processamento de materiais metálicos que traz em seu DNA a excelência necessária para conduzir soluções através de seus serviços que prezam por eficiência, custo-benefício e respeito ao meio ambiente.
Há mais de 2 décadas no mercado potiguar, a empresa familiar foi criada por Joaquim Patrício(in memorian), que por ser muito visionário instalou a sede próximo ao polo petroquímico, com o intuito de expandir os negócios, passando a atender a Petrobrás e toda a região. Hoje, a empresa é líder na comercialização de metais no Oeste Potiguar, atendendo empresas do segmento de mineração, metalurgia, agropecuária, salineira, construção civil, fruticultura e de petróleo não só no Rio Grande do Norte, mas em outros estados do Brasil.
Somos especializados em logística reversa e realizamos um trabalho de grande importância para o meio ambiente, isso se confirma através da Certificação ISO 14001, demonstrando o comprometimento com a redução de impactos ambientais e atendendo às expectativas de sustentabilidade exigidas. Além disso, para afirmar o seu compromisso social de incentivar e contribuir para uma sociedade mais justa, a empresa promove ações, através de campanhas durante o ano, que visam levar alegria e doações às comunidades mais carentes da cidade.
Desde a sua criação, a JPatrício constrói uma história de muita responsabilidade com seus colaboradores, parceiros e clientes e busca sempre acompanhar a modernidade e as inovações no setor de atuação.

Name: eleXion
Description:
Collaborating with our German partners, who are leading experts, with a combined experience of over 50 + years in the prevention of system corrosion, eleXion provides high quality equipment, and technical advice aiding installations to become compliant with VDI 2035, which is Europe’s primary water treatment regime. 

This standard is approved by many of the world’s leading HVAC manufacturers and has also been incorporated within the latest BSRIA BG 50 guidance for closed loop water treatment, which we were invited to provide technical advice on during its draughting. 

Traditionally the flushing and ongoing system protection methods in the UK have focused on the use of chemical additives. These do not offer long term system protection and result in large volumes of chemicals being used and vast quantities of contaminated water being flushed back into our water drainage network. 

It is well known that a major cause of plant and system breakdown is poor water quality, incorrect chemical dosing, and poor ongoing water monitoring. These can have a detrimental effect on valuable assets causing premature failure, often well before the systems’ end of life expectancy.

With modern equipment and systems becoming increasingly efficient with tighter operating parameters and closer control, the impact of poor water quality can be significant!
Our solutions sustainable and environmentally friendly, encompassing natural metal passivation processes, offering superior corrosion protection, without the use of harsh chemicals. 

We work closely with designers, installers, building owners and system operators, offering solutions that combat the issues of scale and sludge, protecting valuable main plant assets and maintaining performance.

Contact us today and see how utilising chemical free water treatment, is not only less complicated than you might think, but also provides real benefits to you and your systems.

Name: Plumber's Choice Water Solutions, exclusive distributor of Flow-Tech Home
Description:
Plumber's Choice offers professional contractors the opportunity to expand their business and improve their bottom line with water treatment.  Top quality, cutting edge products, combined with expert training and great customer support provides the elements needed to succeed.

Better quality water with less water waste and reduction in bottled water waste is good for the earth and all of it’s inhabitants. When we stop looking at water treatment as a luxury and understand the necessity, we can see the opportunity to really make a difference.

We believe for plumbers specifically, it is not only an option to offer water treatment, it’s a responsibility.  The work a plumber does protects the sanitation and well being of building inhabitants.  Improving the quality of water they recieve is just as, if not more, important.

Water filters help remove the undesireable impurities in water.  Systems come in various forms with various levels of reduction and removal capabilities.  You will have a complete product offering to service your clients needs and wants.

Water conditioners are necessary in many markets and desireable in most others, to control the problems associated with calcium and magnesium scale build up in water.  You will have both traditional softeners, dual softener and filtration systems and the revolutionary FLOW-TECH Home anti-scale system to care for this demand.

Name: Canyurtlar
Description:
Canyurtlar, ısıtma ve soğutma sektöründe öncü bir konumda bulunan ve yüksek kaliteli kombi baca ekipmanları sunan bir kuruluştur. Uzun yıllara dayanan deneyimimizle, müşterilerimize güvenilir, verimli ve güvenli ısıtma çözümleri sunmak için sürekli olarak çaba gösteriyoruz.

Firmamız, sektördeki en son teknolojileri ve en iyi malzemeleri kullanarak, kombi baca sistemlerinin performansını en üst düzeye çıkarmayı hedeflemektedir. Müşteri memnuniyeti odaklı yaklaşımımızla, müşterilerimizin ihtiyaçlarına tam olarak cevap verebilecek çeşitli ürünler sunmaktayız.

Canyurtlar olarak, güvenilirlik, kalite ve yenilikçilik ilkelerine sıkı sıkıya bağlıyız. Ürünlerimizin dayanıklılığı ve yüksek performansıyla müşterilerimize uzun vadeli çözümler sunmayı hedeflerken, sektördeki gelişmeleri yakından takip ederek ürün yelpazemizi sürekli olarak genişletiyoruz.

Müşterilerimizin güvenini kazanmak için, ürünlerimizin tamamında standartların üzerinde kalite kontrolü uygulamaktayız. Ayrıca, çevreye duyarlılığı gözeterek, enerji verimliliğine ve sürdürülebilirliğe odaklanarak müşterilerimize çevreci çözümler sunmaktayız.

Profesyonel ve uzman ekibimiz, müşterilerimizin ihtiyaçlarına uygun çözümler sunmak için sürekli olarak eğitim almaktadır. Müşterilerimize en iyi hizmeti sunmak için ekip olarak çalışıyor ve her müşteriye özel çözümler üretiyoruz. Canyurtlar ailesi olarak, sektördeki liderliğimizi korumaya ve müşterilerimizin güvenini kazanmaya devam edeceğiz.

(DE) REQ.A ist ein Unternehmen, das aus der zwanzigjährigen Erfahrung seiner Partner im Bereich erneuerbare Energien hervorgegangen ist. Immer stärker von der Sonne und ihrer sauberen Energie angezogen, hat sich REQ.A von Anfang an das Ziel gesetzt, die Möglichkeit zur Erfassung und Verwaltung der von der Natur angebotenen Energie zu innovieren, um die Leistung von Solaranlagen im Vergleich zum Markstandard zu steigern. Wir bieten qualitativ hochwertige, robuste und langlebige Systeme mit optimierten Wirkungsgraden durch den Einsatz führender Technologien in unseren Systemen, wobei die Benutzerfreundlichkeit für den Anwender stets im Blickpunkt steht.

Energieffektivisering är ett område som vi specialiserat oss på. Det finns många olika delar i en anläggning som kan förbättras och därmed minska driftskostnaderna. Ett exempel är det samarbete vi har är Ecoclime Group, gällande deras lösning kring återvinning av värmeenergi i spillvatten. Vi är idag en prioriterad partner till dem och installerar anläggningar runt om i Sverige. 
Lösningen heter Evertherm och kan återvinna minst 90% av energin och över tid ger den en mycket betydande besparing av både fjärrvärmeförbrukning och minskade driftskostnader.

Varje dag i veckan förebygger, förbättrar och utför vi hos våra kunder

NEROBEL est une entreprise spécialisée dans l'importation et l'exportation de produits de plomberie et sanitaire de haute qualité. La société offre une large gamme de produits de plomberie et sanitaire, allant des toilettes en céramique, lavabos en céramique, robinets, accessoires de salle de bain, flexibles de branchements d'eau, mécanismes de chasse d'eau, tuyauteries et canalisations d'eaux potables, siphons de douches, siphons de cour, meubles de salle de bain, mirroirs, chauffes eaux électriques, chauffes eaux de gaz, éviers de cuisine et les accessoires de cuisine.

NEROBEL propose également ses propres marques, Sanivy, Theros, Rossio et Sanitherm, qui sont réputées pour leur qualité, leur originalité, leur choix et leur disponibilité. Ces marques offrent une garantie de qualité pour les clients.

NEROBEL importe ses produits de plomberie et sanitaire de plusieurs pays, notamment de la Chine, l'Égypte, la Bulgarie, l'Italie, la Turquie et la Tunisie. L'entreprise se distingue par son engagement envers la qualité supérieure de ses produits, ainsi que par sa capacité à offrir une large sélection de produits pour répondre aux besoins des clients.

En fin de compte, NEROBEL est une entreprise de confiance pour les professionnels de la plomberie, les artisans, les entreprises et les particuliers qui cherchent des produits de plomberie et sanitaire de haute qualité.

Name: American Pipelining Solutions
Description:
American Pipelining Solutions (APS) is your long-term partner in trenchless pipe repair. We provide reliable tools, expert training, and real-world support to help contractors boost efficiency and profit—on every job, every day.

With decades of combined industry experience, our team brings global trenchless innovations to the U.S. market—making them accessible, practical, and profitable for contractors across North America.

APS offers industry-leading products like Raptor Cutter, Protect & Pull, Versa-Patch, Versa-Light, Houseliner, RIDGID, Dancutter, Sewertronics, Speedylight, Sacpro, and QuickSight. Whether you're patching, lining, inspecting, descaling, or locating leaks, we’ve got the gear and guidance to help you do it right.

Our training programs are tailored to every level—from CIPP lining and UV curing to patching, descaling, and leak locating. We don’t just train—we stay with you long after the job starts, offering real-time technical support and jobsite troubleshooting when it matters most.

Looking for a mobile solution? We design and build custom CIPP trucks and trailers, ranging from budget-friendly setups to premium rigs that maximize ROI and workflow.

APS is also a certified repair center for cameras, cutters, jetters, and more—getting your tools back in the field and working like new.

When you work with APS, you're not just buying equipment. You're gaining a partner that’s committed to your long-term success.

Historique
Fondée en 1929, par le rachat d’une quincaillerie de centre-ville, Néton & Cie s’est développé jusqu’en 1986 Place de la république à Voiron, avec un clientèle de particuliers, d’artisans et petites industries. Le transfert sur la zone d’activité des Blanchisseries, alors naissante, marquera l’orientation vers les professionnels. Les bâtiments fonctionnels seront agrandis en 2002 par l’adjonction de l’actuel hall d’accueil, pour porter la surface couverte à 1100m2. Pour renforcer ses sources d’achats, l’entreprise devient en 2000, un membre actif du réseau de distributeurs indépendants GEADIS.

Description:
Uğur Hırdavatçılık Üretim ve Pazarlama A.Ş. is a company established in 1965, with the Ayvacı family becoming partners in 1970. Originally operating as Uğur General Partnership, the company underwent a name change in 1977 and adopted its current name, Uğur Hardware Manufacturing and Marketing Inc.

Furthermore, Ayvacılar Metalware Industry Inc. was founded in 1975 and started producing traditional latch locks, a complementary line of business for the company. This activity continued until 2001. However, in 1986, the Ayvacı family withdrew their partnership with Ayvacılar Metalware Industry Inc.

Uğur Hardware Manufacturing and Marketing Inc. made its first import in 1987 by importing meters from China. The company has continued its import activities to this day. It has a wide range of products and has become a reliable brand in the hardware industry.

Uğur Hardware Manufacturing and Marketing Inc. places great importance on customer satisfaction and aims to provide high-quality products. With years of experience, the company strives to offer innovative solutions by keeping up with industry developments. It conducts continuous research and development efforts to meet customer demands and provide products that cater to their needs.

Today, Uğur Hardware Manufacturing and Marketing Inc. has a strong supply network and serves a wide customer base. In addition to hardware, hand tools, fasteners, building materials, and similar products, it also offers specialized solutions for various sectors.

With its extensive experience, quality products, and customer-centric approach, Uğur Hardware Manufacturing and Marketing Inc. hold a significant position in the industry. It aims to continue offering innovative solutions and ensuring customer satisfaction in the future.

Name: Erb Company Inc
Description:
Erb Company's tradition of supplying excellence and expertise to WNY plumbing and HVAC needs goes back over 100 years. Initially, George Erb founded the organization in the early 1900's as a provider of irrigation piping supplies to local farmers. Over the next few decades, the company continued to grow and thrive, remaining family-owned and run for 4 generations. For Larry Erb, whose leadership for over 40 years has seen the company through changes of all kinds, the philosophy of Erb Company boils down to the importance of the quality of the relationship that is forged when doing business with valued customers.

Now, Erb Company has evolved into a leading wholesaler in the area, supplying a huge variety of plumbing and heating supplies, pipes, valves, fittings, underground products, and waterworks. Larry passed away in 2013, with his son Allen taking the helm. Allen Erb embraces the traditional values that have built the company's success, but prepares for the future by bringing in relevant new ideas and technologies.

Name: GUAJANA dal 1875
Description:
Una Grande Storia Siciliana.

La nostra azienda nasce a Palermo nel 1875, nel centro storico di via Calderai, inizialmente specializzata nella vendita di bilance e bilichi con la “GUAJANA GIOVANNI BATTISTA E FIGLI”.
Proseguendo l’attività negli anni e passando la gestione di padre in figlio, abbiamo seguito un’evoluzione naturale che ci ha posto come intermediari fra le aziende produttrici ed i rivenditori di ferramenta, rivestendo nel dopo guerra un ruolo di primaria importanza presso la sede storica del Teatro di Santa Cecilia.
E’ nel 1977 che l’azienda diventa Società per Azioni ed assume l’attuale denominazione di Guajana Ferramenta S.p.A. condotta con guida sicura prima dalla terza generazione con Giovanni Battista e successivamente dal figlio Rodolfo che con il suo coraggio, tenacia e perseveranza, ha preservato l’Azienda da gravi ingerenze esterne.
La quinta generazione, rappresentata da Giovanni e Marcello, raccoglie questa eredità e guida con innovazioni di settore, attenzione alla specializzazione dei collaboratori e cura del cliente un’impresa ancora più moderna e dinamica che si presenta sul mercato con una offerta sempre più completa e rinnovata che spazia su più categorie merceologiche.

Our dual mission is simple:
serve homeowners with exceptional craftsmanship and equip skilled plumbers with real career opportunities.

Residential Plumbing Services

We focus exclusively on home plumbing systems, offering homeowners trusted solutions for repairs, installations, emergency fixes, and fixture upgrades. From water heater replacements to drain and sewer services, our certified team ensures every project is completed with precision, safety, and long-term reliability.

Frontier Academy & Recruitment

Every plumber we hire or refer goes through our internal Frontier Academy—covering hands-on workshops, residential plumbing standards, troubleshooting techniques, and job-readiness training.
Once certified, we match these professionals with reputable companies seeking dependable, high-quality plumbing talent.

Why Frontier?

Homeowners receive trustworthy, fully certified residential plumbers

Companies access vetted, job-ready talent trained to our quality standards

We combine real-world service with hands-on education and workforce development

Firma Kolanko powstała w roku 1992 i od tamtej pory rozwija się w branżach wodno-kanalizacyjnej, grzewczej i budowlanej. Zdobyte doświadczenie pozwala nam wyjść naprzeciw potrzebom rynku i ciągle wzbogacać ofertę.

Zaopatrywanie naszych klientów w artykuły budowlane oraz materiały wykończeniowe jest naszą misją i pasją. Od lat ze szczególną uwagą wybieramy produkty, które cieszą się nienaganną opinią w branży. Dostępne w asortymencie naszego centrum budowlanego materiały poddawane są starannej selekcji.

Proponowane przez nas towary i rozwiązania znajdują zastosowanie w instalacjach gazowych, wodociągowych, kanalizacyjnych, ściekowych, przemysłowych i technologicznych, centralnego ogrzewania oraz ciepłej wody użytkowej.

W Kolanko wierzymy, że firmę tworzą ludzie, dlatego niezależnie od działu i stanowiska, dla nas liczy się wzajemny szacunek, lojalność i równe szanse. Jako sklep i firma stawiamy na stały rozwój oraz dążenie do doskonałości i staramy się zapewniać to również wszystkim naszym pracownikom. Oferujemy wachlarz profesjonalnych szkoleń i dajemy możliwości awansu.

Name: Heating Partner
Description:
Heating Partner nastao je spajanjem dve ugledne firme sa dugogodišnjem iskustvom – instalatera grejne tehnike i solarnih sistema i DESIGN AND BUILD-a.

Obnovljivi izvori energije su glavni pokretač i nosilac energetske tranzicije u borbi protiv klimatskih promena.

Naši osnivači, Vlatko Turuntaš i Milan Miladinović, diplomirani inženjeri mašinstva, udružili su svoje znanje i iskustvo kako bi ponudili jedinstvenu IN HOUSE uslugu zasnovanu na DESIGN AND BUILD modelu.

Zahvaljujući ukazanom poverenju brojnih korisnika, uspešno smo sproveli sve projekte implamentacije toplotnih pumpi i solarnih sistema, postavši vaš pouzdan partner za buduće potrebe u oblasti grejanja i klimatizacije.

Naše usluge uključuju:

Konsultacije i procena: Detaljna analiza vaših specifičnih zahteva za određivanje najefikasnijih i najisplativijih rešenja za grejanje i hlađenje.

Instalacija: Profesionalno podešavanje različitih sistema toplotnih pumpi uključujući sisteme vazduh-vazduh, vazduh-voda, voda-voda i zemlja-voda.

Održavanje i podrška: Sveobuhvatna postprodajna usluga koja osigurava da vaš sistem radi sa vrhunskom efikasnošću tokom cele godine.

Prelaskom na sistem toplotnih pumpi ne samo da štedite na troškovima električne energije, već doprinosite i evropskoj strategiji za prelazak na “čistu” energiju sa niskom emisijom CO2, čime štitite životnu sredinu.

Name: Groupe Brangé
Description:
Plongez dans l’univers du Groupe Brangé, où tradition et innovation se conjuguent depuis 1870.

Historiquement implanté à Bias (47), notre groupe rayonne aujourd’hui dans tout le Sud-Ouest – notamment à Auch, Agen et Dax – avec 9 sociétés et 140 collaborateurs unis autour de deux pôles : le recyclage et la distribution de produits métallurgiques et de quincaillerie.

Nous accompagnons aussi bien les professionnels que les particuliers, en mettant à leur disposition une offre complète de produits et de services pour répondre à tous types de projets.

Notre activité de négoce comprend une vaste sélection de matériaux métallurgiques (acier, inox, aluminium...) et de références en quincaillerie et outillage, pensée pour les artisans, industriels, entreprises du bâtiment comme pour les bricoleurs avertis.

En parallèle, nos sites de recyclage spécialisés assurent la collecte, le tri, le rachat et la valorisation de nombreux déchets : métaux ferreux et non ferreux, cartons, papiers, verres, DIB, véhicules hors d’usage, etc. Chaque matière est revalorisée pour lui offrir une seconde vie, dans une démarche concrète en faveur de l’économie circulaire et de la réduction de l’empreinte écologique.

Rejoignez le Groupe Brangé et prenez part à une aventure collective fondée sur la performance, la durabilité et l’impact positif. 

Ensemble, façonnons un avenir responsable.

Name: Ecos
Description:
Poduzeće Ecos d.o.o. Vitez na bosanskohercegovačkom tržištu postoji već punih 25 godina te je za taj period postalo prepoznatljivo ime u svijetu materijala za centralno grijanje, kupaonske opreme, keramičkih pločica i vodovodnog materijala. 

U svojoj širokoj ponudi, Ecos nudi gotovo sve renomirane domaće, europske i svjetske brendove iz programa grijanja i vodomaterijala, a od samog osnutka proizvodi i fleksibilne cijevi vrhunske kvalitete.

Kad govorimo o materijalu za grijanje, u Ecosu ćete pronaći više od 3000 različitih artikala za sve vrste konvencionalnog i alternativnog grijanja – kotlove, kamine, radijatore,spremnike, solarne kolektore, razdjelnike, spojne elemente i sav prateći materijal potreban za instalaciju grijanja u rezidencijalnim, poslovnim ili hotelskim objektima, a imena kao što su: Vaillant, Thermoflux, Herz, Viega, Austria Email, Daikin, Tesy, Vogel&Noot, Heimeier samo dio brendova koje Ecos ima u svojoj ponudi.

U oblasti opremanja kupaonica osnovna je vodilja ponuditi kvalitetan materijal koji uz dugotrajnost i ugodan dizajn ima cijene konkurentne na našem tržištu. 

Keramičke pločice koje se nalaze u širokom asortimanu Ecosa odlikuju se visokom kvalitetom materijala, a dizajn može varirati od čiste, bezvremenske klasike do modernih reljefnih ili fotoprint površina. Sanitarije, kade, kabine i kupaonski namještaj koje se nalaze u širokom spektru Ecosove ponude proizvedene su po visokim europskim standardima, a raspon cijena i modela je neograničen. 

Pored toga, u Ecosu ćete pronaći najpoznatije proizvođače opreme za kupaonicu kao što su: Geberit, Sanit, Kolo, Ideal Standard, Unitas, Hansgrohe, Kludi, Teorema, Framini, Aquamax, Hidra, Peštan, Vargon, Kovina i slično.

Həmçinin  “MİMSAN Grup”un  Azərbaycanda rəsmi nümayəndəsiyik. Fəaliyyət göstərdiyimiz müddətdə Bakı və regiyonlarda müxtəlif layihələr yerinə yetirmişik. O cümlədən zavodlar, məktəblər, xəstəxanalar, fərdi villar və digər obyektlərin qazanxana sisteminin layihələndirməsini və qurlaşdırmasının həyata keçirmişik. Müştəri məmnuniyyəti əsas şərtimiz olduğumuz üçün peşakar ustalarımızın tərəfindən görülən bütün işlər dəqiqliklə yerinə yetirilir. Gördüyümüz bütün işlərə zəmanət veririk. Zəmanət müddətində hər hansı bir detal və ya avadanlıqda texniki problem yaranarsa dərhal bizim əməkdaşlar tərəfindən baş verən nasazlığı ardan qaldırmaq üçün baxış keçirilir və qısa bir müddətdə həll edilir.

Hədəfimiz, işimizi beynəlxalq meyarlara, mövcud qanunvericiliyə və standartlara uyğun olaraq, müəyyən olunmuş müddətdə keyfiyyətli, ekoloji cəhətdən təmiz, iş sağlamlığı və təhlükəsizlik şərtlərini əsas götürərək, müştərilərimizin mövcud və dəyişən ehtiyaclarını tam olaraq anlamaq, sərfəli və qeyd-şərtsiz müştəri məmnuniyyəti ilə həyata keçirməkdir.

Name: Commercial Plumbing and Fire Supplies (CPFS)
Description:
Founded in 2006 and based in Melbourne, Recycled Rain is a premier supplier and distributor of fire protection systems, valves, meters, and related accessories. We offer a wide selection of top-quality pressure-reducing valves, including:

Gate, butterfly, check, and ball valves
Strainers and gauges
Hot and cold water meters
Flow switches for both residential and commercial applications
In addition to valves and accessories, we specialize in custom sprinkler control valve packages. These packages can be housed in secure cabinets or as standalone assemblies, designed to meet the specific fire protection needs of any project.

At Recycled Rain, we take pride in offering the most comprehensive range of products and solutions to ensure you find the perfect flow control options. Our dedicated team provides expert technical advice, reliable sales support, and outstanding customer service for all your control and metering needs.

In 2018, Recycled Rain introduced the CPFS brand, specializing in fire protection products and commercial plumbing supplies. Our extensive inventory includes pressure-reducing valves, flow switches, gauges, and a wide variety of piping bulk items and plumbing accessories for both commercial and residential projects.

Our range of fire products also includes diesel fire pumps, fire water tanks, and more. In addition, we offer premium technical services and supply products for stormwater, civil water, and reticulation systems.
At CPFS, we are committed to supporting sustainable solutions on the path to net carbon zero. We partner with leading Australian commercial hot water manufacturers to offer a range of options tailored to meet our customers’ specific project requirements.

Additionally, we provide skid packaging services that comply with AS standards, ensuring top-quality and certified solutions.
Whether you are working on a new installation, a large-scale project, or a retrofit, CPFS provides complete solutions to you!
