Name: ÅKERHOLMS RÖR AB
Description:
Värme- och sanitetsarbeten
Åkerholms Rör AB grundades år 1936 och vi har avdelningar i Hörby och Höör. Vi utför främst VVS-arbeten inom kategorierna service, renovering och värmepumpar. I både Hörby och Höör har vi dessutom VVS-butiker. Med undantag av installation och service av värmepumpar så är merparten av våra uppdrag i Hörby och Höör. 
Oavsett vart vårt uppdrag är så utgår vi alltid på morgonen från den avdelning vi är anställd på. Dvs att om vi har ett projekt i exempelvis Lund så börjar arbetsdagen på firman 07:00 och därefter kör man till Lund. Man förväntas alltså ej vara på plats i Lund 07:00 om vi skulle ha uppdrag där.

Om du trivs med varierande arbetsuppgifter inom VVS så skulle Åkerholms Rör kunna vara passande för dig. Exempel på VVS-tjänster vi utför är badrumsrenoveringar, VS-arbeten i samband med nybyggnation & renovering, installation av värmepumpar och diverse servicearbeten så som reparation av hydroforanläggningar, VVS-armaturer m.m.

Hör gärna av dig om du är intresserad av att arbeta med oss.

Name: American Trenchless
Description:
Rooted in Northwest Ohio and proud to serve the surrounding communities, American Trenchless was founded with a single focus: to deliver efficient, high-quality underground solutions with minimal disruption to homes, businesses, and infrastructure. As a locally-owned and operated company, we understand the unique needs of Northwest Ohio properties and the importance of reliable sewer and drain systems to the communities we serve.

Built on a foundation of trust, technical excellence, and customer-first service, American Trenchless is proud to be licensed, bonded, and insured. Every project, large or small, is completed with the same commitment to fast, reliable service and backed by a workmanship guarantee that reflects our high standards. From single-family homes to large municipal systems, we bring specialized trenchless technology — including industry-leading HammerHead tools — and a results-driven approach to every job.

American Trenchless offers future-ready solutions to meet the demands of deteriorating and aging underground systems across residential, commercial, and municipal sectors.

Trenchless Pipe Lining (CIPP)
Internal pipe rehabilitation using advanced cured-in-place pipe methods, restoring pipe structure without the need for excavation.
Sewer Line Replacement and Installation
Full sewer line replacements and new system installations completed with minimal ground disturbance.

Sewer Line Relining
Reinforcement of aging or damaged sewer lines to improve flow and extend system lifespan without the cost of excavation.

Sewer Camera Inspection
Real-time, high-definition inspections to quickly and accurately diagnose pipeline issues before they worsen.

Hydro Jetting
High-powered water jetting to remove stubborn blockages, heavy buildup, and debris inside sewer and drain lines.

Name: Radiatorland
Description:
Radiatorland er Danmarks førende radiatorspecialist. Vi har gennem mere end 40 år leveret driftsikre og kvalitetsbevidste radiatorløsninger.
Med over 30.000 radiatorer på lager kan vi sikre dag-til-dag levering i hele Danmark med stort hele vores lagerprogram af:
Panelradiatorer, planradiatorer, vertikalradiatorer, lavkonvektorer, håndklæderadiatorer, søjleradiatorer, støbejernsradiatorer og adskillige varianter af ventiler, følere, fittings, radiatortilbehør og værktøj.

Standardlagerprogram på radiatorer:
Højder: 70 mm – 2000 mm
Typer: 11, 21, 22, 33, 44
Længder: 300 mm – 3000 mm

Derudover er vi i stand til at skaffe mange forskellige specialradiatorer på ikke-lagerførende dimensioner, miljøradiatorer samt radiatorer i specialfarver.

Ventilsystemer, fittings, radiatortilbehør og værktøj: 

- Ventiler, følere, indsatse/reservedele mv.
- Fittings: Omløbere, overgange, bypass/fortrydelsesstykker, spring/forskruninger mv.
- Tilbehør: Topriste, sideplader, frontplader, bæringer, ben, afstandsstykker, propper/luftskruer, rosetter/skjulere mv.
- Værktøj

Radiatorland investerer i at finde forskelligt tilbehør og fittings for at sikre, at vores VVS-installatører kan få fittings og tilbehør til at kunne montere nye eller udskifte radiatorer – uanset om der er nybyggeri eller renovering af ældre ejendomme.

Vi ønsker desuden at lette arbejdet for vores VVS-installatører ved udskiftninger fra gamle installationer og modeller – ”Work smarter, not harder”.

Leverantörer och producenter som vi jobbar med i Europa och Asien är av bästa kvalitén och dom är speciellt utvalda för den svenska marknaden. Det nordiska klimatet sätter verkligen produkterna på prov. 

Borco levererar till kunder i Norden men även till Estland, Lettland och Litauen.

Vi tillhandahåller det mesta inom infästning och tillbehör för både företag (prefab, bygg, industri) och privatperson. 

Här i lilla samhället Bor strax söder om Värnamo, försöker vi alla hålla ihop och se möjligheter inte problem.

Vid pennan

Name: Ali Juma Farhan Trading LLC
Description:
Ali Juma Farhan Trading LLC is a small but dynamic company located in the United Arab Emirates. Our core business is supplying all types of hardware materials to a diverse range of industries. Our products range from pipes, fittings, valves, flanges, gaskets, fasteners, and more. However, we take pride in being known for our extensive range of clamps in SS316L and SS304.

Our clamps are available in a variety of types, including pipe clamps, tube clamps, hose clamps, and cable clamps. We stock them in different sizes and configurations to cater to specific requirements. SS316L is a premium stainless steel alloy that is highly resistant to corrosion and rust. It is commonly used in harsh and corrosive environments such as chemical processing plants, offshore oil and gas rigs, and marine environments. SS304, on the other hand, is a more economical stainless steel alloy that is widely used in a variety of applications including food processing, pharmaceuticals, and construction.

Despite being a small company, we pride ourselves on the quality and variety of products we offer. Our team sources our products from leading manufacturers around the world to ensure the highest quality and reliability. Our products are tested to ensure compliance with international standards and regulations.

Our focus on quality and reliability has helped us to build a loyal customer base. Our customers come from a diverse range of industries, including oil and gas, construction, food processing, and pharmaceuticals. We understand the unique needs of each of our customers and work closely with them to ensure they receive the right products for their specific requirements.

Despite being a small company, we understand the importance of timely delivery. We have a streamlined supply chain that ensures our products are delivered to our customers on time. We work closely with our logistics partners to ensure that our products are shipped in the most efficient and cost-effective manner.

Name: Thermosoft Australia
Description:
We're helping Australians make the switch to sustainable, efficient electric heating - without sacrificing quality, comfort or style

By providing great products and friendly, old-fashioned service, we’ve been able to help thousands of Australians get off gas while staying wonderfully warm and cosy in winter over the past 23 years.

Our mission now is to accelerate Australia’s move to an all-electric future. To do this, we’re adopting forward-thinking technologies and approaches that allow us to deliver the friendly service and brilliant products we’re known for to more people than ever.

Our Products
Since 1999, Thermosoft Australia has been the exclusive Australian distributor for electric radiators and FINIMETAL towel rails from our European supplier, Purmo Group. 

Our radiators and towel rails combine the unrivalled comfort and warmth of radiant heating with timeless European styling and exceptional build quality. All at significantly lower upfront cost than comparable gas hydronic systems.

Our original radiators were sold under the LVI brand. LVI, Lidköpings Värmeindustri was founded in Lidköping, Sweden in 1922. In 1970 the factory was expanded to include the manufacture of oil-filled electric radiators. It was around this time the first Yali products were born. By using the most durable materials available, Yali’s timeless style set the standard for the entire industry in quality, design and performance.

LVI is now owned by Purmo Group, one of the world’s leading manufacturers of hydronic heating. Our electric radiators are made on the same production lines as regular hydronic radiators.

Name: Infrared Group
Description:
Innovative Heating Solutions | Energy Efficiency | Sustainability | Cost Savings

At Infrared Group, we are passionate about revolutionising the way we heat our homes, we specialise in cutting-edge technology for energy-efficient and sustainable heating solutions. Our products include Air Source Heat Pumps, Air Conditioning units and our flagship product: Infrared Heating Panels.

Infrared Group is at the forefront of infrared heating as the new go-to solution for homeowners and developers. These panels utilise advanced technology to emit radiant heat, directly warming people and objects in the room rather than wasting energy on heating the air.

Key Benefits Of Infrared Heating:

 Significant Cost Savings: Infrared Group's panels offer a highly efficient heating method, translating into substantial savings on energy bills for homeowners.

 Enhanced Sustainability: By reducing energy consumption, Infrared Group's panels contribute to a greener future, lowering carbon emissions and promoting environmental stewardship.

 Improved Comfort: Experience the cozy warmth of infrared heating, with no drafts, dry air, or noise disturbances typically associated with traditional heating methods.

 Flexible Installation Options: From residential properties to commercial spaces, infrared Group's panels are versatile and easily integrated into existing or new buildings, offering developers a cost-effective heating solution (we also offer a fitting service).

If you are looking to enhance comfort, reduce costs, and make a positive impact on the environment, we would be thrilled to discuss how infrared panels can transform your heating systems.

Sıhhi tesisatçılık insan sağlığının korunmasıyla doğrudan ilgilidir. Şehirleşme ve modern hayat, ihtiyaçlarla birlikte tesisat ve tesisatçılığın önemini artırmıştır. Aynı şekilde kullanılan araç gereç ve teknikler de gelişmiştir. Temiz su, ilk çağlardan beri insanoğlunun varlığında önemli bir rol oynamıştır.

Mekanik tesisat projelendirme, müşavirlik veya kontrol işlemlerinde malzeme seçiminden, ürünlerin ve binanın kullanım ömrü boyuncu hizmet alma adına aşağıdaki kriterler göz önünde bulundurulmalıdır. Anahtar teslim projelerimiz proje hayata geçmeden önce müşteri ihtiyaçlarına uygun bir şekilde tasarlanır.
Sürekli gelişen teknolojinin sunduğu imkanlardan yararlanarak; kısa zamanda doğru çözümler bulan, her biri konularında profesyonel kadrosu, ekonomik ve kaliteli iş anlayışıyla müşteri kitlesi tarafından her zaman tercih sebebi olmuştur.

Nata dall’esperienza pluriennale di Celeste Frasca, è diventata oggi una delle poche realtà italiane che attua una distribuzione capillare di ricambi originali italiani ed esteri, caldaie, bruciatori a gas e gasolio, strumenti di misurazione e tutto ciò di cui si compone il settore, destinata esclusivamente ai professionisti. 
Grazie all’attenzione da sempre posta su fattori altamente strategici, quali disponibilità prodotto e competitività del pezzo, l’azienda ha sviluppato una costante e concreta espansione sul mercato.
Tecno Ati è diventata un punto di riferimento per i professionisti del settore, in grado di soddisfarne tutte le esigenze attraverso una prossimità territoriale, garantita da una rete capillare e altamente specializzata di partner distributivi (Punti Tecno Ati), un sistema specialistico ed esclusivo di e-commerce con la base dati più completa del settore e funzionalità all’avanguardia e una rete vendita distribuita su tutto il territorio italiano per assicurare una concreta vicinanza al cliente. La costumer satisfaction rappresenta l’obiettivo primario!

Name: Zane Pool Heating
Description:
Founded in 1974, Zane is an Australian company specialising in customised solar and conventional heating systems for residential, commercial and Olympic swimming pools.

Zane has been synonymous with the Australian pool industry for nearly 40 years due to its uncompromising commitment to quality, reliability and efficiency.

Long before the terms ‘carbon footprint’ and ‘eco-friendly’ became commonplace, Zane was harnessing the natural energy of the sun so homeowners could extend their swimming season without harming the environment.

Zane reached international acclaim in 1978 when it received an Australian Design Award, and then selected the following year as a finalist for the Prince Phillip Design Award.

In addition to creating its versatile, integrated solar pool heating system, Zane also established a nationwide network of authorised dealers. This not only ensures every system sold is correctly designed and installed but also serviced by specially trained inspectors.

Furthermore, Zane solar heating systems are independently tested to meet exacting Australian Standards.

Zane is a subsidiary of Waterco Ltd, an ASX listed company manufacturing and distributing a diverse range of products for the international swimming pool and water treatment markets. Waterco is also the franchisor of Swimart, Australia and New Zealand’s largest network of pool and spa retail outlets.

Name: Leafinator
Description:
At The Leafinator, we believe that maintaining a beautiful and clean yard should be a joy, not a laborious task. We are passionate about revolutionizing the way people handle the never-ending challenge of raking and picking up leaves and debris. Our mission is simple: to develop a modern and easier way to tackle this task, eliminating the pain and strain associated with overexertion from yardwork.

We understand the frustration and physical toll that traditional raking and cleaning up your yard can have on you. The constant bending, stooping, and grabbing of leaves and debris can leave you feeling exhausted, sore, and discouraged. That's why we created The Leafinator—to transform the way you clean up your yard and make it an effortless and enjoyable experience.

Our innovative design is the result of extensive research and development, combined with a deep understanding of the challenges faced by homeowners and gardeners worldwide. By harnessing the power of cutting-edge technology and ergonomic design principles, we have crafted a solution that takes the hard work out of yard work.

But our vision extends beyond just creating a groundbreaking tool. We aspire to build a global brand that resonates with individuals who value their time, their well-being, and their environment.

Na tržištu smo prisutni od 2005. godine i od samog početka poslovanja težili smo da opremanje kupatila ne predstavlja napor, već zadovoljstvo i uživanje.

Ključnu ulogu u pružanju kompletne usluge imaju naši partneri, sa kojima delimo iste vrednosti - poverenje i poštovanje.

Name: Clevatech Ltd
Description:
Safely installing a gas boiler is a one-person job using the Clevatech Boiler Lifter. Clevatech have created this brand-new, boiler lifting tool. Designed for professional heating engineers to make installing a gas boiler easier, safer and more profitable.
Muscle strains and back injuries due to manual handling are common for installers. This can lead to time off work and loss of earnings. The Clevatech Boiler Lifter is fully compliant with Health and Safety Executive guidance for working safely. Using this tool will greatly reduce the risk of injury due to manual handling.
Operated by one person the Boiler Lifter is ideal for awkward installations in confined spaces. Not only does using the lifter make installing easier and safer it could result in big savings in labour costs. The redistribution of labour could make every install more profittable too.
Clever technology utilises a standard core drilled flue hole, through a cavity wall, to securely lock the tool in place. A sliding arm extends to clear expensive work tops and other obstacles. Powered by a brushless drill, the lifter makes quick and easy work of handling heavy boilers, just by squeezing the trigger. The tool takes the boilers weight, while the installer guides it safely and precisely onto the wall bracket.

Name: DB Industri
Description:
DB Industri tilbyder innovative og miljøvenlige varmeløsninger til industri og ervherv.

Vi har mange års erfaring med at designe og implementere skræddersyede løsninger til store industrielle virksomheder. Vores ekspertise spænder over alle typer af varmeløsninger, fra traditionelle kedler og varmepumper, til mere avancerede varmesystemer.

Vi tror på, at hver virksomhed er unik, og at deres varmebehov vil variere afhængigt af en række faktorer, såsom størrelse, type, branche og beliggenhed. Derfor tilbyder vi løsninger, der er specifikt tilpasset hver enkelt kundes behov og krav. Vores team af erfarne specialister vil samarbejde med jer hele vejen, for at sikre den mest optimale varmeløsning som dækker alle behov.

Vi er stolte af at have etableret os som en pålidelig partner for store industrielle kunder. Vi er altid klar til at hjælpe med at løse selv de mest komplekse varmeudfordringer. Kontakt os i dag for at høre mere om hvad vi kan tilbyde og hvordan vi kan hjælpe med at imødekomme jeres virksomheds varmebehov.

En del af DBVVS
DB Industri er en dedikeret afdeling i DBVVS, som er en førende leverandør af varmeløsninger og VVS-produkter til private kunder. Mens DB VVS har specialiseret sig i online salg og løsninger til private hjem, har DB Industri fokus på at levere store, unikke varmeløsninger til virksomheder, forsyninger, institutioner og andre kommercielle kunder.

Du kan læse mere om DBVVS ved at besøge siden Om DBVVS.

Name: Wise Consult S.R.L.
Description:
Societatea L&C Invest prezentă din anul 1995 pe piața comercială românească este cunoscută ca distribuitor de echipamente și accesorii pentru instalațiile termice, solare și de alimentare cu apă și gaz.
Prima colaborare se stabilește cu fabrica românească Armatura Cluj, încă de la începuturi, în anul 1995.
Datorită faptului ca s-a dovedit un partener de încredere pentru colaboratorii și clienții săi, în anul 2000, începe colaborarea cu firma austriacă Herz Armaturen.

Anul 2003 aduce pentru compania noastră noi colaborari cu ITAP și AQUA, două companii din Italia cu un puternic impact pe piața mondială a instalațiilor de alimentare cu apă.
În prezent, compania iși consolidează renumele câștigat pe piața românească, acționând cu profesionalism și devotament, oferind produse și servicii de calitate.
Din 2004 am înființat și compania Wise Consult SRL din nevoia de a deservi cât mai bine divizia de online și am dezvoltat continuu rețeaua de producători și branduri de top.
Vă invităm în magazinul nostru online unde vă punem la dispoziție o gamă diversificată de produse de calitate de la producători de marcă, documentație tehnică, oferte, noutăți și promoții.
Livrăm rapid și sigur, iar colegii noștri vă stau la dispoziție cu consiliere tehnică pentru alegerea celor mai potrivite armături, în funcție de proiectul de instalații pe care îl aveți.

Name: Phoenix Heating & Renewables Ltd
Description:
At Phoenix Heating and Renewable Ltd, we deliver exceptional heating and renewable energy solutions tailored to your needs. Based in the South West, we proudly serve Somerset, Bristol, and Bath. Our goal is to keep your home warm, efficient, and environmentally friendly all year round. Our focus on heating and renewables in Somerset reflects our commitment to sustainability and customer satisfaction.
We offer a comprehensive range of services, including the supply and installation of air source heat pumps and solar photovoltaic (PV) systems. Air source heat pumps provide a sustainable heating solution. They extract heat from the outside air, even in colder temperatures. This process delivers reliable warmth and hot water while reducing energy bills and your carbon footprint. Moreover, our expert team customises each installation to meet your property’s unique needs.
In addition to heat pumps, we offer solar PV systems. These systems allow homeowners to harness solar power effectively. By converting sunlight into electricity, they reduce reliance on traditional energy sources. As a result, this leads to substantial cost savings and a lower environmental impact. With rising energy prices, investing in solar PV is a wise choice for your finances and the planet.

Name: Hub Distribution Ltd
Description:
Chris Jepp, after more than 30 years experience as a plumbing and heating engineer to both individual customers and many estate agents, was frustrated at not finding more robust products to use and install.  Using poor products resulted in revisits to cure the same problem at a later date.

In 2015, Chris, who is based in Kent, decided to put into action his ideas for manufacturing innovative new products that overcome age old problems. The aim; to save many thousands of call outs to properties for simple solutions to recurrent problems.

Hub Distribution Ltd was formed in 2017.

The first challenge was  to make a new product that the owner/occupier of the property could use to fill their boiler without fear of water leaks, over-pressurising the boiler, or for the need of an engineers call out.  This is how the WRAS approved and patented JEPP VALVE was born.

Moving on to another common problem within household plumbing, Chris looked at the connection between the flush pipe from a cistern and the WC pan.  For many years we have used a push fit rubber or plastic connector, but these can be prone to leaks, causing long term problems to flooring, creating damp and leading to expensive repairs.  With these issues in mind, Chris designed a new, fool proof, leak free connector, the JEPP CONE.

The JEPP STOP was created to prevent a washing machine from back filling and also also eliminating smells. Uniquely this also ensures an open ended pipe on the kitchen sink outlet cannot be left that would leak if a new appliance has not been connected.

Name: Canasolutions
Description:
Nous sommes une jeune entreprise, située dans les Pyrénées-Orientales (66), spécialisée dans la recherche de fuite, le curage et la réparation par chemisage sans casse et sans désagrément sur tout type de canalisations d'évacuation ; fonte, PVC, fibrociment amianté, béton, grès, horizontale ou verticale, du diamètre 50 mm à 250 mm.
Nous intervenons chez les particuliers (tous les logements ayant des réseaux d'évacuation encastrés ou enterrés non visitables subissant de l'usure ou de la détérioration et chez les professionnels (syndics de copropriété, les OPH, immeubles, hôtels, collectivités …)	
Qu’est-ce que le chemisage de canalisations ?
	Le chemisage a pour objectif la remise en état d’une canalisation lorsque celle-ci est détériorée ou présente un défaut tel que des racines d’arbres ou des joints défectueux.
Cette technique consiste à réparer l’intérieur des canalisations, en général non visitables, par un procédé de résine. Cette technique de réhabilitation de canalisation par chemisage, dite non destructive, présente de nombreux atouts : 
⦁	Appropriée à quasiment tous types de dommages et tous types de tuyaux.
⦁	Jusqu’à 50% plus économique qu’une méthode avec ouverture de tranchée.
⦁	Remise en état de grandes longueurs de canalisations (plusieurs dizaines voire centaines de mètres) en une seule opération.
⦁	Excellente tenue mécanique dans le temps.
⦁	Très faible réduction de la section de la conduite.
⦁	Réhabilitation rapide sans excavations, casse et bruit.
Ce procédé permet de rendre étanche les canalisations et de bloquer tout contact entre le matériau de la conduite (dans le cas du plomb, amiante) et l’eau qu’elle transporte.
	L’entreprise CANASOLUTIONS vous accompagne dans tous vos problèmes de canalisations, recherche de fuite, dé racinage, recherche de réseaux, curage, débouchage et surtout chemisage. N’hésitez pas à faire appel à nous, une équipe professionnelle est à votre écoute.

For your sanitary facilities, I prefer copper for its antibacterial properties, but also PER, multilayer and PVC.

In your thermal installations, I choose copper as a priority because of its anti-electrolysis characteristics (does not cause the deposit of iron filings), as well as galvanized steel, and PER.

I ideally work with cast iron for drains, but PVC is a perfect solution for your wallets.

Name: Horizon Underfloor Heating
Description:
YOUR UNDERFLOOR HEATING SPECIALISTS

Horizon UFH is your specialist supplier of underfloor heating systems for residential and commercial projects. With over 15 years of experience, we provide the top products, expert advice, and complete solutions for electric and hydronic underfloor heating. Our friendly team will assist you every step of the way, from design to supply and installation.

What We Offer

As your one-stop shop for all your underfloor heating needs, we supply a comprehensive range of products required to install an efficient underfloor heating system. From the durable piping that runs under the floor to the control systems that regulate the heat, we have everything plumbers need to complete the job.

PIPEWORK
We supply various types and sizes of pipe suitable for underfloor heating systems including PEX and PERT pipes that are flexible, durable and easy to install.

MANIFOLDS
Our manifolds allow for efficient distribution of the heated water to multiple heating loops and provide isolation valves for each loop.

CONTROLS
We offer thermostats and control systems to regulate the underfloor heating system and enable customized heating zones.

PUMPS
We provide pumps designed specifically for underfloor heating systems to circulate the heated water through the pipes.

INSULATION
Our insulation boards provide thermal insulation under the floor to maximise heat output upwards into the room.

Name: FARMD-Bar System
Description:
Say Goodbye To False Alarms Forever.

FARMD-Bar System is a game-changing adaptation that dramatically improves sump pump performance by eliminating false alarms from float tangling. It’s a solution so simple, you’ll wonder why anyone didn’t think of it before. 

How It Works

It’s As Easy As 1, 2, 3.

Step 1. Install the FARMD-Bar System 3-6” above the highest weighted float.

Step 2. Attach the Cord Lock to each float cable.

Step 3. There is no step 3.

Seriously, it’s that simple. The FARMD-Bar System connects all floats together to create a stable platform that prevents any rotation. This greatly reduces the floats from slipping from their designated heights and causing a false alarm. The FARMD-Bar System is not secured to the chamber like a float bracket, but instead is connected directly to the floats themselves using manufacturers designated Cord Locks.

Name: Mauro Distribuzione Srl

La Mauro Distribuzione srl nasce da un’idea.
L’idea è quella di avere un’ azienda che metta al centro del proprio lavoro il “servizio” al cliente prima del prodotto.
Il nome dell’azienda trova le sue origini in Mauro Messia, agente di commercio nel settore del condizionamento e del riscaldamento che per oltre 30 anni ha svolto il proprio lavoro con professionalità e dedizione.
Nel 2012 a seguito della prematura scomparsa di Mauro Messia, sono subentrati i figli, Andrea ed Alessandro. Sin dall’inizio sono state seguite le orme del padre.
La missione è stata da sempre quella di proseguire il lavoro iniziato 30 anni prima, cercando di portare avanti i valori che hanno da sempre contraddistinto l’Agenzia.
Nel gennaio del 2020, nasce la Mauro Distribuzione, un’azienda con un magazzino di oltre 1000 mq che svolge attività di “distribuzione tecnica “ di materiale termoidraulico.
“ Quello che offriamo non è solo il prodotto, ma soprattutto il servizio. “ Distribuzione tecnica” proprio perché non vendiamo “scatole”, il centro del nostro lavoro è il professionista.”

Name: ADEY Germany
Description:
ADEY arbeitet auf eine Zukunft hin, in der alle Heiz- und Kühlsysteme vor Korrosion geschützt sind. Das spart Geld bei den Energierechnungen und hat einen positiven Einfluss auf die Umwelt. 

Mehr als 9 Millionen Haushalte auf der ganzen Welt nutzen bereits ADEY MagnaClean und sparen so jedes Jahr mehr als 2,25 Millionen Tonnen CO² ein. 

Wir haben es uns zur Aufgabe gemacht, Systemausfälle für alle zu vermeiden, und unser Ansatz wird von Installateuren und Heizungsingenieuren auf der ganzen Welt übernommen.

Als Vorreiter für bahnbrechende Technologien zum Schutz und zur Wartung von Systemen aller Formen und Größen bieten wir innovative Produkte und Lösungen für alle Arten von Gewerbe- und Wohngebäuden in Großbritannien, Frankreich, der DACH-Region, den nordischen Ländern, Polen, der Türkei, den Benelux-Staaten, Nordamerika, Kanada und China - und wir werden jedes Jahr größer.

ADEYs führender Ansatz zur Systemwartung, bekannt als ADEY Best Practice, wird durch ein umfassendes Angebot an Magnetfiltern und Wasseraufbereitungslösungen, ein UKAS-akkreditiertes Labor und Wasseranalysedienste unterstützt. 

Wir haben zahlreiche Preise gewonnen, darunter drei angesehene "Queen's Awards for Enterprise in Innovation" und sowie mehrere weitere Branchenpreise.

Um mehr zu erfahren, besuchen Sie https://adey.com/eu/de/ oder folgen Sie uns auf Facebook, YouTube und LinkedIn.

Name: W H Halmshaw Ltd
Description:
Independent, Local and Proud
At W H Halmshaw Ltd we’ve been serving the people of East Yorkshire and North Lincolnshire for over 40 years. From humble beginnings, we’ve developed into the region’s leading independent suppliers of bathrooms, plumbing/heating supplies and glass products.

Whilst things have changed a lot in the past 40 years, we’ve never lost sight of the principles the business was founded on and today, enjoy a strong reputation for friendly customer service, high-quality products, and excellent prices.

We’re completely independent and aren’t tied to any specific brands or manufacturers. This means we can pick and choose from a huge range of the best products available at any one time, and provide expert, impartial advice to all our customers.

Committed to Customer Service
In everything we do, we aim to be professional, dependable and trustworthy. We enjoy a huge amount of repeat business and referrals via word of mouth, thanks to our commitment to customer service.

What this means in practice is that all our staff members are knowledgeable, helpful and experienced, and deliver the same personal service to every customer that walks through the door. We know that customers don’t want the hard sell – they want friendly advice and honest service.

Convenient and Competitive
At all times, we aim to keep large quantities of stock on site, so when you need components, you can get hold of them quickly, and at great prices. Our showrooms and sales desks are conveniently located in both Beverley and Hull, and are open six days a week (Monday – Saturday). In addition, we also offer free delivery throughout the region.

Why not come down and visit us today, and find out why more and more people are choosing to shop with us.

Name: Citywide Plumbers
Description:
Citywide Plumbers is a trusted London-based plumbing and heating company, delivering fast, reliable, and affordable services across Greater London. With years of experience and a team of fully certified engineers, we specialise in a wide range of plumbing, boiler, and heating services for residential and commercial clients alike.

From emergency plumbing call-outs and blocked drains to boiler installations, central heating repairs, and annual gas safety certificates, we cover it all. At Citywide Plumbers, customer satisfaction and safety are at the heart of everything we do. We’re proud to offer same-day appointments, transparent pricing, and workmanship guaranteed by highly trained professionals.

As Gas Safe registered engineers, we ensure all heating and boiler work meets the latest legal and safety standards. Whether you’re a landlord in need of a CP12 certificate, a homeowner upgrading to an energy-efficient boiler, or a business looking for dependable maintenance, we are here to help.

What sets us apart is our commitment to fast response times, clear communication, and honest service. Our team operates 24/7 for plumbing and heating emergencies, and we strive to resolve most issues on the first visit.

Citywide Plumbers is more than just a service provider—we’re your local experts, committed to building long-term relationships based on trust, quality, and professionalism. We’re proud to serve all boroughs of London, and we’re ready to assist you—no matter how big or small the job.

Name: MC Tecnoforniture srl
Description:

Oggi la M.C.Tecnoforniture grazie al rinnovato profilo aziendale, ad una organizzazione capace di concentrare in se esperienze e ruoli diversi ed integrati, alla nuovissima sede operativa ubicata sulla tratta Cisterna-Latina, si propone ai tradizionali clienti del settore pubblico, delle aziende private e degli operatori tecnici, con un servizio di fornitura ed assistenza di prodotti professionali sempre più qualificato ed attento alle ampliate ed evolute esigenze espresse dal mercato.
Un livello consolidato di fornitura che la M.C.Tecnoforniture utilizza come know how indispensabile per poter garantire capacità e servizio anche a nuove utenze, della realtà pubblica, privata ed industriale, che vogliono affrontare sfide e progetti sempre più avanzati, evoluti ed in un bacino territoriale sempre più ampio.
Le categorie merceologiche trattate sono molteplici e abbracciano tutto l'universo della termoidraulica, del riscaldamento, della climatizzazione sia civile che industriale, dell'anticendio, dell'irrigazione. Particolare interesse è dato alle forniture industriali, al trattamento delle acque.
Infine tutto ciò che conviene dal settore dell'idrotermosanitari: rubinetterie e sanitari, ceramiche, camini/termocamini, arredobagno tradizionali e design.
Un team che lavora per Voi, sempre pronto a soddisfare ogni Vostra richiesta ed esigenza.

Name: GREENJET
Description:
GREENJET makes water savings measurable. We engineer flow optimized nozzles for showers and faucets that cut consumption by up to 66 percent while keeping full comfort. The technology uses a two phase Venturi effect with air intake. It is TÜV certified, patented, and made in Austria. Warranty is 10 years.

Why it matters
Less hot water means less energy and less CO₂. From every 100 euros saved about 60 euros come from energy for hot water, 26 euros from wastewater charges, and 14 euros from cold water. A typical 100 room hotel saves about 15,000 to 25,000 euros per year. Comfort stays the same and no changes to building systems are required.

What sets us apart
• Retrofit in minutes
• Durable parts and long service life
• Measured A B tests and clear proof of savings
• ESG ready data and certificates on request
• Production and quality assurance in Austria

Mission
Sustainability as a business model. We deliver measurable impact in water, energy, and CO₂ and connect environmental goals with clear financial results. Ready to test or scale across your portfolio. Let us talk.

Name: Atmosphere Plumbing & Heating
Description:
Over 20 Years of Plumbing and Heating Experience in Edmonton.

Rob Souster started his plumbing career in 1998. After learning the ropes of the industry, he knew immediately he wanted to start his own company and the direction he wanted his company to go. In 2005, Atmosphere Plumbing & Heating LTD. was born. Originally focusing on new home builds and plumbing services, the recession of 2008 forced us to change direction. We then went on a 11-year hiatus, learning new business practices and trade secrets to make us the stronger, more educated company that we are today. Since re-introducing ourselves to the Edmonton market in May 2019, we again strive to bring the highest level of customer service back to the plumbing industry. 

What was old is now new again…


No tiered billing system or surprise costs. Atmosphere Plumbing & Heating is going back to the roots where the integrity of a handshake is valued and respected. We invoice by the hour, ensuring the customer receives a quality product at a price that won’t break the bank. We will always specialize in Hydronic Heating, Water Purification and Plumbing and Heating service for our old and new customers, however our knowledge doesn’t stop there.

Need help? Atmosphere Plumbing & Heating will be there for you.

Hem iç piyasada hem de uluslararası alanda güçlü bir varlığa sahip olan firmamız, ürün imalatı ve tedarik hizmetlerindeki uzmanlığını gelişen teknoloji ile birleştirerek e-ticaret alanında da önemli bir konum elde etmiştir.

Kombifirsati.com, Türkiye'nin her köşesine ürün gönderimi yaparak müşteri memnuniyetini ön planda tutar. Düşük iade oranımız, müşterilerimizin alışveriş deneyimlerinin ne kadar olumlu olduğunun bir göstergesidir. Kategorisinde lider markaların satışlarını ve bayiliğini gerçekleştiren firmamız, her zaman en güvenilir ve kaliteli ürünleri müşterileriyle buluşturmayı hedefler.

Kombifirsati.com olarak sunduğumuz avantajlarla alışveriş deneyimini daha da kolaylaştırıyoruz. Tüm Türkiye ve yurtdışına ücretsiz kargo imkanı sunuyor, böylece müşterilerimize ek maliyetlerden kaçınma şansı veriyoruz. Ayrıca tüm bankalarla anlaşmamız bulunmakta olup, müşterilerimiz istedikleri kredi kartıyla güvenle alışveriş yapabilirler. Ödeme kolaylıklarımız arasında 12 aya varan taksit seçenekleri de bulunmaktadır.

Kombifirsati.com, müşterilerine duyduğu güven ve sağladığı uygun koşullarla yoluna devam ederek, alışveriş deneyimini her geçen gün daha da geliştirmeyi amaçlar. Siz de kaliteli ürünleri uygun fiyatlarla satın almak ve güvenilir bir alışveriş deneyimi yaşamak için Kombifirsati.com'u tercih edin!

Our mission is to make advanced water-saving technologies affordable, accessible, and impactful worldwide. With a rapidly growing global market for water meters, quality sensors, and leak detection systems, projected to reach $17.4 billion by 2024, we are at the forefront of delivering solutions that reduce water waste and mitigate costly damage.

Leak detection devices, for example, can lower the frequency of water leak insurance claims by up to 96% and severity by as much as 72%, according to LexisNexis. Name: Next Energies SAS
Description:
En 2018, avec pour fondation une expérience de plus de 20 ans dans le domaine des nouvelles technologies et des nouveaux systèmes de chauffage et de climatisation, notre entreprise familiale vit le jour.
Ensemble, nous avons mis en place et développé un projet avec pour lignes directrices :
Le respect de nos équipes avec un management bienveillant
Le respect de nos engagements et de l'accompagnement de nos clients
L’innovation technologique et la maintenance prédictive pour nos installations.
Stéphane, Président, encadre nos équipes sur le terrain et dans l’opérationnel. Il a pour mission la planification, la réalisation et le suivi des chantiers, et l’approvisionnement. Il est donc en relation avec nos clients pour toutes ces activités. Sa mission, vous satisfaire.
Nathalie, ingénieur de formation et possédant deux masters en management des entreprises, est Directrice Générale de notre entreprise. Elle a en charge les domaines administratif (Comptabilité Clients et Fournisseurs, Ressources Humaines) et de la sécurité, notamment sur les chantiers. Elle développe également l’après chantier, notamment la maintenance des installations. 

Nous avons créé notre entreprise avec une mission simple : Contribuer à un monde, un endroit plus respectueux de l'environnement ; tout en préservant un confort optimum pour les utilisateurs, nos clients. 
C'est ainsi que Next Energies a débuté avec initialement deux salariés et une centaine d'idées sur la façon d’être différent et de faire la différence. 
Au cours des cinq dernières années, nous sommes devenue un acteur majeur dans notre domaine ; tout en restant une entreprise à taille humaine proche de ses salariés.
Next Energies s’attache à donner à tous ses clients une information claire, précise et complète relative aux prestations qui seront fournies. Nous concevons des prestations en adéquation avec les attentes énoncées par le client.

Name: COPT GROUP SRL - INGROSSO FERRAMENTA
Description:
COPT GROUP S.r.l. fondata nel 1988 da Roberto Seren, ha sede in Ferrara, Via Ferrari, 27. L’Azienda nasce e si sviluppa, come società di trasporti a livello nazionale ed internazionale.
Roberto Seren, titolare dell’Azienda, guida la società affiancato dai figli Michele e Stefania, con i quali condivide l’orientamento verso una crescita aziendale basata sulla gradualità di sviluppo, quale necessario strumento per attuare una pianificazione commisurata agli investimenti, in un contesto societario in cui si cerca la giusta miscela tra entusiasmo e competenza, accompagnate dall’immancabile richiamo alla serietà verso tutti i portatori di interesse.
Dal 1989 al 2003 COPT GROUP S.r.l. è stata agenzia commerciale ed operativa per il corriere internazionale DHL, nelle province di Ferrara e Rovigo; in particolare, l’operatività di Padova è stata seguita nell’ultimo biennio.
Per diversi anni,  per conto di una società con sede a Bologna, ha svolto attività di distribuzione di quotidiani, quali, ad esempio, “Il Resto del Carlino”.
Gestendo una ventina di autotrasportatori la Società ha organizzato un capillare servizio di consegne in Emilia Romagna e Veneto, in particolare per importanti aziende operanti nel settore dei servizi ospedalieri, ma non solo. Dall’inizio del 2009 la Società è operativa anche in Toscana.
Nel 2003 COPT GROUP S.r.l. ha rilevato un’attività di distribuzione all’ingrosso di articoli di ferramenta, strutturandosi per servire le ferramenta di Emilia Romagna, Lombardia, Veneto.

Name: Charity's Plumbing Solutions
Description:
Charity Tovar launched Charity's Plumbing solution in April 2023. This minority woman-owned business is growing exponentially.

Charity's focus is on prompt service, competitive pricing, and dedication to customer-centric services. We have a passion for educating homeowners while providing highly skilled plumbers who offer prompt service. There are few women-owned businesses operating in this industrial sector, making the company's success even more significant.

Charity's Plumbing Solutions can meet all plumbing needs including leaks, water heater installation, reverse osmosis systems, whole home water treatment options pressure regulating valves and more.

Community involvement is a cornerstone to the company's values. Charity works with the Phoenix Union High School District to support the service clubs at two Laveen high schools. Charity's Plumbing Solutions is the only business approved by the district as a community partner to collaborate with Betty Fairfax and Cesar Chavez high schools. In addition, the company donated more than $6,000 in scholarships to deserving high school seniors in its first year of operations.

At the higher education level, Charity's Plumbing Solutions has a partnership with the South Mountain Community College's Construction Trade Institute to implement a program in local schools promoting further education with both college and trade schools as viable lifetime careers.

Charity is also involved in the South Mountain and Laveen Chamber of Commerce as a vice president, and is the founder of the annual South Mountain and Laveen Community Picnic.

Charity is part of Laveen Citizens for Responsible Development, the Laveen Coalition Against Fentanyl, and the company is a community partner with the Laveen Community Council, a nonprofit agency that raises and donates money to help youth in Laveen. Charity serves as a director on the on the Laveen Community Council board.

Ние вярваме, че топлината може да създаде незабравими спомени и да придаде уникален характер на всяко жилище. Затова се ангажираме да ви предоставим най-високо качество не само в продуктите, но и в обслужването – от приятелско отношение до експертна подкрепа.

CELO montažne rešitve zajemajo širok program: čepi, vijaki, sidrne mase, betonska sidra, objemke, montažna lepila in ostali montažni pribor. Specializirani so na rešitve pritrjevanja: na fasadne podkonstrukcije, na izolacijo, sanitarne opreme, elektro inštalacije, itd.

Poleg orodja in materiala za zaključna dela v gradbeništvu imamo tudi zastopstva za armature DAMIXA, napredno ogrevalno tehnologijo JAGA in estetsko in funkcionalno stavbno opremo za gibalno ovirane osebe in invalide HEWI:
 
DAMIXA je sinonim za kopalniške in kuhinjske danske armature s tradicijo, visoko funkcionalnostjo, napredno tehnološko obdelavo površin in nordijskim oblikovanjem. Širok izbor površin (barve) armatur in kopal. pribora: mat črna, grafitno siva, polirana in krtačena medenina, krtačen baker, jeklo PVD in krom.

JAGA Climate Designers je priznano belgijsko podjetje za oblikovanje in proizvodnjo energijsko učinkovitih in estetsko dovršenih ogrevalnih in klimatskih sistemov. Njihovi izdelki so namenjeni tako velikim stavbam kot tudi manjšim objektom za ogrevanje in hlajenje s energetsko varčnimi sistemi.

HEWI je visoko kakovostna nemška stavbna in sanitarna oprema za gibalno ovirane osebe, z lepim dizajnom, inovativnimi rešitvami, visoko funkcionalnostjo in kvalitetnimi materiali. Imajo tudi posebne rešitve opreme za načrtovanje prostora, ki je prijazno do oseb obolelih z demenco ali debelostjo.

Name: Association of Heat, Ventilation and Cooling Namibia
Description:
HVAC Namibia is a non-profit organization that deals with all aspects of HVAC systems. This relates to the technology of interior and vehicle environmental comfort (heating, ventilation, and air conditioning). Its objective is to provide thermal comfort as well as adequate indoor air quality. HVAC system design is a specialized branch of mechanical engineering that is based on thermodynamics, fluid mechanics, and heat transfer fundamentals.
HVAC is a critical component of residential properties such as solitary homes, apartment buildings, hotels, and senior living facilities, medium to large industrial and office buildings such as skyscrapers and hospitals, vehicles such as cars, trains, airplanes, ships, and submarines, and marine environments, where safe and healthy building conditions are regulated with respect to temperature and humidity using fresh air from outside.
At HVAC, we consider that an HVAC system's mission extends beyond just heating or cooling a space. Instead, it improves indoor air quality and provides comfort for everyone in a structure. 
Our members are

 	Milenium Refrigeration & Electrical Services CC 
 	Ductxpert cc 
 	Cold Air Technologies cc

Name: PoweRad UK
Description:
PoweRad is a UK-based infrared heating distribution company supplying high-efficiency infrared heating systems for residential, commercial, and retrofit buildings across the UK.

We provide electric-first heating solutions designed to meet modern building regulations, improve EPC ratings, and support the transition away from gas heating. Our infrared heating systems are ideal for retrofit projects, new builds, and commercial properties where traditional wet heating systems are impractical, inefficient, or costly to install.

PoweRad was created to address a common issue in the UK heating industry: advanced heating technology that underperforms due to poor specification, inconsistent installation, or unrealistic claims. Our focus is on correct application, professional installation standards, and long-term performance.

What we do:
• Distribute infrared heating systems across the UK
• Support developers, landlords, and specifiers with compliant electric heating solutions
• Build and manage a UK-wide infrared heating installer network
• Supply heating systems for residential, commercial, and mixed-use buildings

Why infrared heating:
• Electric heating with no boilers, pipework, or wet systems
• Faster installation and reduced labour costs
• Zoned, targeted heating for improved energy efficiency
• Well suited to retrofit, electric-only, and low-maintenance buildings

Our approach is practical and honest. We do not oversell infrared heating or force it into unsuitable projects. We work with installers, developers, and property owners to deliver heating solutions where infrared is the right fit.

PoweRad is committed to building a professional UK distribution model for infrared heating systems based on quality, compliance, and long-term value.

Installers, developers, landlords, and commercial partners are welcome to connect.

Name: Chafic Bou Younes & Co S.A.R.L
Description:
CHAFIC BOU YOUNES Est. was founded in 1975 by Chafic Bou Younes, a plumbing and contracting supervisor. Through supplying and handling plumbing services and products locally in Nahr Ibrahim, Mr. Bou Younes set the core for honest, wholesome and hardworking grounds on which our company operates. We continue to deliver the same standards set by Chafic, dedicating our work to building trustworthy relationships and the utmost satisfaction towards our customers.
At the beginning our market wasn’t as wide as it is today, however the business started growing, and the dream of owning a nationally leading company lived on through the coming generations. Chafic’s three sons, Charbel, Antoine, and Rabih showed loyalty to their father’s work, and enhanced their establishment’s potential.

CHAFIC BOU YOUNES Est.’s first breakthrough was when the company began its expenditure by reaching out and contacting foreign suppliers that can deliver top quality products and services specifically from Italian manufacturers, in 1991. It was the first step towards the increase of the company’s influence on a national scale.
Through patience, dedication and hard work, Chafic Bou Younes & Co has provided the community with high quality Products such as valves, fittings, pipes, water tanks, insulations, and most importantly heating systems.
Today, Chafic Bou Younes & Co is one of the leading aluminum radiator suppliers in the country, however it is not only the product that powers our company. It is the exceptional customer satisfaction with our product and service deliverance that encourage the company to strive and further improve our operations to maintain the product, service and satisfaction our customers expect and deserve.
CHAFIC BOU YOUNES & Co. s.a.r.l. is still considered one of the most trusted and reputed companies in Lebanon, whose field of expertise has expanded to reach every aspect in the sanitary domain from plumbing and heating, to luxurious sanitary ware, ceramics and tiles.

Name: Inštalatérstvo Ježík s.r.o.
Description:
Vitajte na oficiálnej stránke našej spoločnosti! S pýchou predstavujeme Inštalatérstvo Ježík s.r.o. , Váš spoľahlivý partner v oblasti inštalácií vodovodov, kúrenia, kanalizácie a elektriky.

 O NÁS:
Sme odborníci v oblasti technických inštalácií pre rodinné domy a komerčné budovy. Naša spoločnosť sa vyznačuje dlhoročnými skúsenosťami a záväzkom poskytovať najvyššiu úroveň služieb. Sme hrdí naším prístupom k detailom a profesionálnym prístupom k zákazníkom.

 VODOVOD A KÚRENIE:
Zabezpečujeme kvalitné inštalácie vodovodných systémov a kúrenia, či už ide o novostavby alebo rekonštrukcie. Naši odborníci pracujú s najnovšími technológiami a materiálmi, aby zabezpečili efektívne a spoľahlivé riešenia pre našich klientov.

 KANALIZÁCIA:
Naša spoločnosť je špecializovaná na inštalácie kanalizácie, pričom kladie dôraz na efektívnosť, ekológiu a dlhodobú spoľahlivosť. Pomáhame našim klientom dosiahnuť optimálnu funkčnosť a bezpečnosť svojich kanalizačných systémov.

 ELEKTRICKÉ INŠTALÁCIE:
Poskytujeme kompletné riešenia pre elektrické inštalácie s dôrazom na bezpečnosť a energetickú efektívnosť. Naši odborníci majú skúsenosti s projektovaním a inštaláciou elektrických systémov pre rôzne typy budov.

 SPOLOČENSKÁ ZODPOVEDNOSŤ:
Veríme v dôležitosť spojenia s komunitou a pracujeme s ohľadom na životné prostredie. Naše služby sú navrhované tak, aby minimalizovali vplyv na životné prostredie a podporovali udržateľné prístupy v stavebníctve.

 KONTAKT:
Ak hľadáte spoľahlivého partnera pre inštalácie v oblasti vodovodov, kúrenia, kanalizácie a elektriky, neváhajte nás kontaktovať. S radosťou vám pomôžeme s vašimi potrebami.

Ďakujeme, že ste si vybrali Inštalatérstvo Ježík s.r.o. - Vašu prvú voľbu pre profesionálne inštalácie!

Name: Labirent Mühendislik
Description:
Kısaca Şirketimizden bahsetmek gerekirse; İklimlendirme sektöründe 2005 yılında Şirket ortakları olan iki Makine Mühendisi tarafından kurularak faaliyete başlayan Labirent Mühendislik, sektördeki gelişim ve değişimin öncüsü olarak inovasyonu kurumsal yapısı ile özleştirmiş Türkiye’nin lider ısıtma grubu konumundadır. Labirent Doğalgaz; bünyesinde Doğalgaz Taahhüt ve Mekanik Taahhüt Sistemleri sunarak hizmet veren Labirent Mühendislik şirketler grubunun bir parçasıdır. Gelişime yönelik yatırımları ve güçlü altyapısıyla İzmir de bulunan kurumsal satış ve operasyon merkezi, Aydın ve Manisa şubesi, 35 araçlık hizmet filosu, 55 personeli ve 75 ustasıyla beklentilerin üstünde hizmet üretmektedir. Ege Bölgesine yayılmış geniş satış ve hizmet ağı ile ısıtma soğutma sektöründe çözüm sunuyor.

Müşterileri ile birebir iletişime geçerek ne istediklerini analiz eden ve buna göre ısıtma ötesi çözümler geliştiren Labirent Doğalgaz; kalite belgeleri, sosyal sorumluluk projeleri ile doğa ve insana verdiği değeri güçlendiriyor. Isıtma soğutma alanında hizmet verdiği yüzlerce ürün grubunu, sektöründe dünyanın ve ülkemizin önde gelen markalarından temin ederek tüketiciyle buluşturuyor. Bugün, ısıtma sektörünün lider firması olan Labirent 50 bağımsız mekânın ısıtma dönüşümünü başarıyla gerçekleştirmiştir. Yoğuşma, güneş enerjisi ve ısı pompası gibi sadece verimli ısıtma teknolojilerini kullanıyor olması doğaya ve insana verdiği değeri özetler niteliktedir.

Esame nuolat tobulėjanti įmonė. Mokomės patys, ir mokome kitus, kad mūsų klientus pasiektų tik pats geriausias šilumos siurblių servisas. 

Šilumos siurbliai oras vanduo – pagrindinė mūsų veiklos sritis. Individualius šildymo sprendimus parenkame jau daugiau nei 10 metų. Esame šios srities ekspertai. Sekame šildymo sistemų technologijų naujoves ir stengiamės savo klientams pasiūlyti tik kokybiškus katilus. Jeigu prieš keletą metų dauguma rinkosi kietojo kuro katilines, dabar – tai mažiausiai populiarus sprendimas ir dėl papildomų fizinės jėgos sąnaudų, ir dėl aplinkos taršos, ir, žinoma, dėl didesnių finansinių išlaidų.

Bendradarbiaujame su vienais patikimiausių ir žinomiausių Lietuvoje Daikin, Nibe, Atlantic Fujitsu, Giatsu, Midea atstovais. Šilumos siurbliai oras vanduo išsprendžia dvi pagrindines mūsų klientų dilemas: sumažina šildymo sąskaitas bei nereikalauja jokio fizinio darbo. Džiaugiamės galėdami pritaikyti bene kiekvienoje situacijoje individualią oras vanduo šildymo sistemą, kuri gali „draugauti“ su sena katiline bei veikti kaip pagrindinis šildymo šaltinis naujai statomame name.

Name: Steelworks Stainless
Description:
At Steelworks, we only sell top-quality 304 Stainless Tables and Sinks.

All our offerings are 100% stainless steel, never compromising on cheaper galvanized legs or undershelves.

304-grade stainless steel is also known as food-grade stainless steel. 304 stainless steel is the most common form of stainless steel used worldwide due to its excellent corrosion resistance and value. 304 can withstand corrosion from most oxidizing acids. That durability makes 304 easy to sanitize, and therefore ideal for kitchen and food applications. This is why Steelworks only uses 304 for our tables and sinks.  The presence of nickel makes 304 more corrosion resistant. 

The absence of nickel in 430 grade means the stainless steel will most likely crack or fail compared to 304. 430 Stainless, though suitable for dry storage shelving, will not stand up to oxidation in damp or humid environments.

Galvanized steel is cheaper, but will oxidize over time and needs to be replaced sooner as health departments all over the USA are demanding an easier cleaning surface.

Name: SWIFT JOINT
Description:
At Swift Joint, we are pioneering a revolution in India's plumbing and construction industry. We believe that every home deserves a plumbing system that is reliable, efficient, and built to last, free from the pervasive issues of leaks and high costs.

For too long, the industry has grappled with outdated methods like CPVC solvent welding, leading to chronic leakage problems, prolonged installation times, and the unnecessary burden of expensive pipe materials. The promise of superior PE-based pipes (like HDPE and PERT) – which are significantly more affordable and durable – has remained largely out of reach due to the high cost and impracticality of traditional electrofusion technology.

This is where Swift Joint steps in. We've engineered game-changing electrofusion machines that are not only incredibly affordable (from under INR 5,000) but also ultra-portable (base model weighing less than 3 kg) and battery-powered. This innovation allows plumbers to create permanent, leak-proof joints in minutes, without the need for heavy generators or costly fuel. By making advanced electrofusion accessible, we unlock massive material cost savings for large-scale projects, enabling the widespread adoption of more efficient and economical pipe alternatives.

Our vision is driven by Dr. Rohit Nara, our Founder & CEO, a seasoned entrepreneur with over a decade of experience building and scaling ventures. His hands-on approach and relentless determination to solve real-world problems, a spirit forged through founding companies like Nara Technologies Private Limited and Agua Wireless Systems Private Limited, are at the core of Swift Joint's disruptive mission.

Swift Joint is more than just a machine; it's a commitment to a leak-free, more efficient, and sustainable future for India. We are empowering plumbers with cutting-edge tools, reducing environmental waste, and delivering significant economic benefits to developers and homeowners nationwide.

Name: Tall City Air Services
Description:
Air and heating conditioning services are essential for maintaining comfortable and healthy indoor environments in residential, commercial, and industrial spaces. These services involve the installation, repair, and maintenance of heating, ventilation, and air conditioning (HVAC) systems. Skilled technicians ensure that these systems operate efficiently, providing consistent temperature control, improving air quality, and enhancing energy efficiency.

Key Services Offered

1. Installation:
• Setting up new HVAC systems, including furnaces, air conditioners, heat pumps, and ductless mini-split systems.
• Ensuring proper sizing and placement for optimal performance.
• Integration of smart thermostats for enhanced control and energy savings.

2. Repair and Troubleshooting:
• Diagnosing and fixing issues such as refrigerant leaks, faulty compressors, or malfunctioning thermostats.
• Addressing heating system problems, including pilot light issues and uneven heating.
• Emergency repair services to restore system functionality quickly.

3. Maintenance and Tune-Ups:
• Regular inspections and cleaning of air filters, coils, and ducts to prevent clogs and maintain air quality.
• Checking refrigerant levels and calibrating thermostats.
• Seasonal tune-ups to improve energy efficiency and extend system lifespan.

4. Indoor Air Quality Solutions:
• Installation of air purifiers, humidifiers, and dehumidifiers.
• Duct cleaning and sealing to reduce allergens, dust, and pollutants.
• Ventilation system optimization for improved air circulation.

Name: Dyer's Plumbing & Air
Description:
Dyer’s Plumbing & Air provides 24/7 Emergency Plumbing and HVAC Service and Installation to customers of all sizes.  From our headquarters in Eden, NC we proudly serve the entire triad area.

It’s not often a small company endures as long as we have, but with a strong commitment to customer service and traditional values, our family owned and operated business is still here – since 1927!

Dyer’s was founded in 1927 by John Dyer in Eden, NC.  It was originally an auto body shop and wrecker service (there wasn’t much indoor plumbing around town at the time).  It wasn’t until the 1950’s when public water and sewer service began to be installed in town, that Dyer’s entered the plumbing industry.  In 2015, we opened our new office in Winston-Salem with plans to expand our service to the area.

Philosophie: "Tradition ist bewahrter Fortschritt, Fortschritt ist weitergeführte Tradition." Diese Maxime prägt unser Handeln seit über einem Jahrhundert.

IBG Coex d.o.o. je porodično trgovinsko preduzeće osnovano 2005 godine. Preduzeće je pravni naslednik radnji COEX i EL-GAS koje su poslovale u oblasti usluga od 1994 godine. U ovom periodu servis EL-GAS je proizveo atmosferski gorionik i atestirao na Mašinskom fakultetu po ug.br.243/1 od 08.12.1995. godine i standardu JUS M.E6.300. 

Danas IBG COEX d.o.o. se bavi trgovinom opreme za grejanje (kotlovi na gas, struju, čvrsto gorivo, pumpe, radijatori, grejači, ekspanzione posude, sve za podno grejanje, cevi za grejanje i celokupne opreme za ceo proces instalacije grejanja) i hlađenje ( klima uređaji i toplotne pumpe). 

Uvoznici smo termostata COTHERMO, POER, pumpi AQUAMAX, gasnih merača TDM, dimovoda STABILE, keramičkih grejača za pelet gorionike SELTRON, proizvoda pod robnom markom COTHERMO (creva za gas, kugla ventili. razdelnici za podno)

Poslujemo preko veleprodaje i maloprodaje u Staroj Pazovi. Trenutno zapošljavamo 6 radnika sa visokom, višom i srednjom stručnom spremom i planiramo dalje.

COEX servis Vam stoji na raspolaganju 365 dana u godini. Bavimo se servisiranjem kotlova na gas sledećih proizvođača: Viessmann, Baxi, Immergas, Bosch, Ferroli. Trudićemo se da i dalje budemo stručno osposobljeni, opremljeni, efikasni i uvek dostupni.

Name: RVS ENERGY ROMANIA
Description:
RVS Energy Romania oferă soluții tehnice aplicațiilor energetice care necesită pompe de caldură.
     Specialiștii noștri, cu vastă expertiză in domeniu, vor analiza și oferi variantele optime de pompe de caldură, adaptate nevoilor clienților.
     Pompele de căldură RVS cu CO2 (R744) - unice prin capacitatea lor de a produce apă caldă în regim continuu până la 90 °C, cu temperaturi ambientale cuprinse în intervalul (–25...43) °C, 24 de ore pe zi. Pot fi utilizate cu succes pentru încălzirea unor clădiri noi sau existente, dar pot și să deservească diverse procese tehnologice. Când sunt alimentate cu energie electrică produsă din surse regenerabile, funcționează fără nici un fel de emisii.
     Pompele de căldură RVS cu Propan (R290) – produc apă caldă până la 75 °C și funcționează cu tehnologia EVI, pe care unii producători o numesc "Economized Vapour Injection", iar alții o numesc "Enhanced Vapor Injection". Tehnologia permite creșterea eficienței energetice a comprimării, prin injecție de vapori reci în compresor, la o presiune intermediară (între cea de vaporizare și cea de comprimare), astfel încât practic se realizeaza o comprimare în două trepte cu răcire intermediară, într-un singur compresor, ceea ce mărește eficiența energetică în special, în condiții de temperaturi scăzute ale aerului ambiant, când eficiența ciclului clasic de funcționare a pompelor de căldură scade.

Name: Drain Detailer
Description:
The Drain Detailer drain cleaning tool for sinks clears your drainpipes without the use of harmful chemicals. Most clogs in bathroom sinks start between the drain opening and the P-trap. However, many tools used to clean out the blockages might push those clogs further down the pipes which solves the immediate problem but may lead to more expensive clogs later on. Other tools, might remove some of the hair, but do nothing for the buildup causing the hair to get caught in the first place. 

The Drain Detailer drain cleaning tool for sinks is the first tool specifically designed to completely clear the buildup and any other items clogging your drain from the opening to the P-trap.

Name: Centar energetske efikasnosti
Description:
Dvadeset godina iskustva, jedna vizija budućnosti

CEE priča započela je prije više od dvadeset godina. Tada smo, kao Markov d.o.o. i Markov Trade d.o.o., gradili temelje na iskustvu, inovaciji i predanosti energetskoj učinkovitosti. Na tom putu uvijek nas je vodila ista misao – kako ljudima približiti pametna energetska rješenja koja donose uštede, komfor i dugoročnu vrijednost.

Iz te vizije rodio se Centar energetske efikasnosti (CEE) – jedinstveno mjesto u kojem smo spojili znanje, praksu i tehnologiju. Danas smo više od prodajnog centra: postali smo partner u planiranju i realizaciji projekata koji mijenjaju način na koji živimo i trošimo energiju.

Naš razvoj prati i naša ponuda. Od LED rasvjete i sustava grijanja, došli smo do cjelovitih rješenja koja uključuju:

projektiranje i izgradnju solarnih elektrana,

dizalice topline za modernu i učinkovitu klimatizaciju,

baterijske sustave za pohranu energije,

punjače za električna vozila koji podržavaju novu eru mobilnosti.

CEE nije samo tehnologija – to je i zajednica. Zato smo stvorili i Solarni park, mjesto na kojem naši posjetitelji mogu iz prve ruke vidjeti kako funkcionira solarna energija u praksi. A dio našeg centra čini i Unplugged Bar & Grill, prostor u kojem se energija pretače u zajedništvo, dobru hranu i druženje. Time pokazujemo da održiva budućnost nije samo u inovativnim rješenjima, već i u stvaranju prostora gdje se ljudi povezuju.

Naša je priča rezultat vizije, ulaganja i predanosti. Ali ono što nas najviše motivira nisu brojke ni kvadrati, već osmijeh kupaca i osjećaj da zajedno gradimo održiviju Hrvatsku.

Description:
Specjalizujemy się w dostarczaniu ciepła, głównie ze źródeł ekologicznych. Od niemal 15 lat doradzamy naszym Klientom we właściwym doborze i montażu wszystkich instalacji:
 wodno-kanalizacyjnych,
 CO oraz ogrzewania podłogowego,
 źródła ciepła w postaci pelletu, gazu i pomp ciepła,
 wentylacji mechanicznej z odzyskiem ciepła.

 Kluczowym jest dla nas zadowolenie naszych Klientów, fachowe doradztwo i oferta dostosowana do indywidualnych potrzeb. Dzięki temu proponowane przez nas rozwiązania służą przez lata, spełniając nasze założenie o ekologicznych i wydajnych systemach grzewczych oraz przyczyniających się do skutecznej redukcji smogu i dwutlenku węgla w powietrzu.

 Nasi Klienci mogą liczyć na kompleksowe podejście, obejmujące:
 dobór i montaż instalacji,
 organizację procesu budowy pod tym kątem,
 pomoc w uzyskaniu dofinansowań,
 a także serwis zamontowanych urządzeń.

 Stawiamy na sprawną i terminowa realizację, dostęp do najnowszych technologii i wysokiej klasy obsługę w trakcie i po wykonaniu. To przekłada się na zadowolenie naszych Klientów, o czym świadczą liczne pozytywne opinie na Google, opiewające na średnią 4,9 na 5. Liczby te pokazują, że mamy doświadczenie, znamy się na rynku i potrafimy dbać o relacje.

 Od momentu założenia firmy zrealizowaliśmy ok. 2000 inwestycji w domach nowych i modernizowanych. W ciągu roku dokonujemy ich średnio ponad 150. Natomiast nasza firma dwukrotnie – w latach 2018 i 2020 – została laureatem konkursu Orły Instalatorstwa, a w 2021 roku zostaliśmy uznani jako najlepsi w branży przez portal Oferteo. Posiadamy certyfikaty od wszystkich producentów urządzeń z naszego portfolio.

Name: Saulės broliai
Description:
„Saulės broliai“ – tai nuolat tobulėjanti įmonė, jau daugiau nei 17 metų tiekianti aukštos kokybės šildymo sprendimus. Specializuojamės šilumos siurblių oras-vanduo srityje, siūlydami individualius sprendimus tiek naujiems, tiek renovuojamiems namams. Bendradarbiaujame su patikimais gamintojais, tokiais kaip Daikin, Nibe, Atlantic Fujitsu, Giatsu ir Midea, siekdami užtikrinti efektyvius ir patikimus šildymo sprendimus mūsų klientams. 

Mūsų paslaugos apima:

- Konsultacijas: padedame išsirinkti tinkamiausią šildymo sistemą pagal individualius poreikius.

- Įrangos tiekimą ir montavimą: užtikriname profesionalų įrangos pristatymą ir sumontavimą.

- Techninį aptarnavimą ir garantinį servisą: teikiame nuolatinę priežiūrą ir greitą reagavimą į iškilusias problemas – 98% klientų pagalbos sulaukia per 2 darbo dienas. 

Be šilumos siurblių, siūlome ir kitą įrangą: rekuperatorius, vandens filtrus bei medžiagas ir priedus. Mūsų tikslas – suteikti klientams visapusiškus sprendimus, užtikrinančius komfortą ir energijos efektyvumą. 

Mūsų biurai įsikūrę Kaune (Vaidoto g. 1) ir Vilniuje (Mozūriškių g. 21-32). Susisiekite su mumis telefonu +37063577677 arba el. paštu info@saulesbroliai.lt – mūsų komanda pasiruošusi padėti jums rasti geriausią šildymo sprendimą.

Name: Kar Buz Eritme Sistemleri
Description:
KAR BUZ ERİTME SİSTEMLERİ KAR VE BUZ BİRİKİMİ ENGELLEME SİSTEMİ
       Kar Buz Eritme (Kar Eritme, Buz Eritme, Don Koruma ) sitemleri, tüm dünyada, kar ve buzla mücadele için üretilmiş ekipmanların, komplike bir şekilde çalıştığı bir sistemlerdir. Bu sistemler ya mevcut bir ısıtma sistemine (Kazan, Kombi,Isıtıcı Cihaz ) bağlanarak sulu yerden ısıtma sistemi ile yada elektrikli ısıtıcı kablolar ile otomasyonlu bir şekilde yapılır. Bu sistemlerin çalışma prensibi, sensör üzerinden alınan dış hava sıcaklığı +4 derece ve altı ise sensöre enerji gönderilerek sensör üzerindeki ısıtıcı devreye sokulur eğer üzerinde kar veya buz var ise eriyerek nem oluşturur ve nem bilgisinin % 50 ve üzeri ise kar ve buzun oluşum şartı gerçekleşmiş olduğu tespit edilerek termostata çalış komutu iletilmesi ile termostat sistemdeki ısıtma kablolarına enerji gönderilmesini sağlamaktadır. Kar buz eritme sistemi, mahalin hızlı bir şekilde kar ve buzdan arındırılması için ısıtma kablolarının ısıtması ile gerçekleşir. Mahalde buz oluşumunu veya kar birikimini engelledikten sonra sistem devreden çıkmaktadır. Burada dikkat edilmesi gereken konu, uygulama yapılacak mahalin ihtiyacını karşılayacak sıklıkta ( Güçte,watta ) kablo serimi yapılmasıdır. Kurulacak güç iklim şartlarına bağlı olarak bir metrekareye 350 W/m2 veya 500 W/m2 arasında seçilmelidir. Bu hesaplama yapılmaz ise kar ve buz eriyemeyeceğinden sistem çalışır ancak gücü yetmediği için bir türlü beklemeye geçmez ve sistem çalışıyor denilerek sistem sizlere teslim edilir. Sistem yaklaşık 1 saat çalışır ve 15-45 dk beklemeye geçer sensörden gelen bilgiye göre kar ve buz oluşumu var ise bir saat kadar daha çalışır bu böyle devam eder. Sistem gücü ihtiyaca göre kurulmamış ise kar buz eritme sistemi ısıtıcı kabloları devamlı devrede kalır.

Kar buz eritme sistemleri termostatları iki şekilde seçile bilir.
Dış hava sıcaklığına göre bir termostat seçimidir. Dış hava sıcaklığı, ayarlanan sıcaklığın altına düştüğünde ısıtıcı elemanlarına güç gönder

Name: Ins Leak Detection
Description:

We can locate the cause of a leak without causing any damage until the source of the damage / leak is exposed and ready for repair.

WHICH LEAKS CAN WE DETECT?
Leaking central heating pipe work or boiler issues
Leaking hot or cold water pipes
Ingression of rain water
Rising damp
Leaking external incoming water supplies
Leaking bathroom facilities

NON-EVASIVE LEAK DETECTION:
Do you have water damage to floor coverings, ceilings or walls?
A spinning water meter but nothing in use within the house or a high-water bill?
Loft tanks constantly running?
Combination boiler losing in pressure?
Is your plumber / builder scratching their heads and you’re worried that everything must be excavated or taken out to locate the cause?

OUR METHODS INCLUDE:
Drone Inspection Surveys
Thermal Imaging Cameras
Moisture Meters
Endoscopes Cameras
Acoustic / Ground Microphone Profiling
Tracer Gas
Dye Testing Leak Detection
Salts Testing

Name: شركة عملاق الصيانة
Description:
شركة عملاق الصيانة لمقاولات العامة
شركة عملاق الصيانة تُعد من الشركات الرائدة في المملكة العربية السعودية في مجالات كشف تسربات المياه، أعمال العزل، الصيانة، والمقاولات العامة. تتميز الشركة بخبرة تفوق 15 عامًا، وتقدم خدماتها في مدن مثل جدة ومكة، مع ضمانات تصل إلى 10 سنوات.
كشف تسربات المياه
تستخدم عملاق الصيانة أحدث التقنيات الإلكترونية للكشف عن تسربات المياه دون الحاجة إلى تكسير، مما يوفر الوقت والتكاليف. يشمل ذلك استخدام أجهزة الاستشعار الصوتية والكاميرات الحرارية لتحديد مواقع التسرب بدقة عالية. تقدم الشركة تقارير تفصيلية عن المشكلات المكتشفة، مع حلول فعّالة لضمان عدم تكرار المشكلة.
أعمال العزل
توفر الشركة خدمات عزل متكاملة تشمل:
عزل الأسطح: لحماية المباني من التسربات المائية والحرارية، باستخدام مواد مثل البولي يوريثان والأغشية المطاطية.
عزل الخزانات: لضمان سلامة المياه المخزنة ومنع التسربات، مع استخدام مواد عزل معتمدة.
عزل المسابح: لحماية هيكل المسبح والحفاظ على جودة المياه، مما يقلل من تكاليف الصيانة المستقبلية.
تُنفذ جميع أعمال العزل بواسطة فريق متخصص، مع ضمانات تمتد حتى 10 سنوات.
الصيانة العامة
تقدم عملاق الصيانة خدمات صيانة شاملة تشمل:
الصيانة الكهربائية: تصميم وتنفيذ التركيبات الكهربائية، تركيب أنظمة الإضاءة، لوحات التوزيع، وأنظمة الطوارئ، بالإضافة إلى الصيانة الدورية وإصلاح الأعطال.
الصيانة الصحية (السباكة): تركيب أنظمة السباكة، الأدوات الصحية، كشف وإصلاح التسريبات، مع التركيز على جودة العمل وسرعة التنفيذ.
المقاولات العامة
تُقدم الشركة خدمات المقاولات العامة التي تشمل:
إنشاء وصيانة المسابح: من التصميم إلى التنفيذ، مع استخدام أفضل المواد والتقنيات الحديثة.
أعمال الترميم والتجديد: للمباني السكنية والتجارية، مع الالتزام بأعلى معايير الجودة.
لماذا تختار شركة عملاق الصيانة؟
خبرة طويلة: أكثر من 15 عامًا في تقديم خدمات موثوقة ومتميزة.
فريق متخصص: عمالة محترفة ومدربة على أعلى المستويات.
ضمانات ممتدة: تصل حتى 10 سنوات على معظم الخدمات.
أسعار تنافسية: مع الحفاظ على جودة العمل العالية.
خدمة عملاء متميزة: متوفرة على مدار الساعة، طوال أيام الأسبوع.
للمزيد من المعلومات أو لحجز الخدمة، يمكنكم زيارة الموقع الرسمي: https://imlaqsiyanah.com/

Nuestro amplio catálogo incluye una variedad de productos seleccionados cuidadosamente para garantizar su durabilidad y desempeño. Nuestro equipo de expertos está siempre dispuesto a brindarte asesoramiento personalizado y orientación técnica, asegurando que encuentres los productos adecuados para tus necesidades específicas. Name: Eco Renewables UK
Description:
At Eco Renewables, we help UK households access free home energy upgrades through the government-backed ECO4 scheme, with no upfront cost, no hassle, and full support from start to finish.

Our mission is simple: make homes warmer, cheaper to run, and more energy-efficient, especially for low-income and vulnerable households who need it most. Whether it’s loft insulation, solar panels, air source heat pumps, or first-time central heating, we ensure every eligible home receives the support it’s entitled to.

We handle the entire process, from eligibility checks and home surveys to installation and aftercare. Our team of qualified professionals works closely with homeowners, tenants, and landlords to deliver high-quality energy-saving improvements that reduce bills and improve comfort, at absolutely no cost to those who qualify.

We also work with community referrers and partners, offering a £300 commission per qualified lead, helping spread awareness while rewarding those who connect eligible households with much-needed support.

If you or someone you know is on benefits or a low income, they may be eligible. The funding is real, the process is simple, and the results are life-changing.

 Get in touch to check eligibility or become a referral partner today.

Together, we can reduce energy bills, cut carbon emissions, and create warmer, more sustainable homes across the UK.

Name: Loerts Gebäudetechnik GmbH
Description:
Willkommen bei Loerts Gebäudetechnik GmbH - Ihr Partner für erstklassige Gebäudetechnik in Weener und im Rheiderland! Als echte Ostfriesen, in der malerischen Region verwurzelt, legten wir bereits im Jahr 1995 den Grundstein für unser Unternehmen. Ursprünglich als Einzelunternehmen "Udo Loerts - Heizung/Sanitär", hat sich unser Betrieb im Laufe der Jahre zu einem leistungsstarken Team entwickelt.

 Mit exakt 24 Jahren Erfahrung und einem Team von 13 engagierten Mitarbeitern sind wir heute die Loerts Gebäudetechnik GmbH. Unser Fokus liegt auf der Bereitstellung von hochwertigen Dienstleistungen im Bereich Gebäudetechnik. Wir sind stolz darauf, Ihre Projekte im Neubau, Umbau und bei Altbausanierungen zu begleiten. Unser Ziel ist es, Ihr Leben in den Räumen mit modernster Technik so angenehm wie möglich zu gestalten.

 Um den gestiegenen Anforderungen gerecht zu werden, haben wir im August 2021 unseren neuen Firmenstandort im Gewerbepark Rheiderland eröffnet. Mit einer Lager- und Bürofläche von rund 520 Quadratmetern auf einem 3400 Quadratmeter großen Grundstück bieten wir die Möglichkeit eines voll digitalisierten Lagers, was für uns ein wichtiger Schritt in Richtung "Handwerk 4.0" ist. Qualität, Transparenz und Innovation sind die Grundpfeiler unseres Erfolgs.

 Als Dienstleister in der Region Rheiderland und darüber hinaus setzen wir auf partnerschaftliche Beziehungen zu unseren Kunden. Unsere Nähe zur ostfriesischen Kultur spiegelt sich in unserer Arbeit wider, und wir sind uns bewusst, dass gelegentlicher Eigensinn Teil unseres Charmes ist.

Kontaktieren Sie uns, um zu erfahren, wie wir Ihr nächstes Projekt unterstützen können. Wir freuen uns darauf, Sie in allen Fragen der Gebäudetechnik zu begleiten.

Kami juga menyediakan layanan konsultasi untuk membantu klien memilih solusi terbaik yang sesuai dengan kebutuhan operasional mereka.

Sebagai [Karawang industrial supplier](https://www.dutaswarnagroup.com/search/label/Karawang%20Industrial%20Supplier?&max-results=5), kami terus berinovasi dan mengikuti perkembangan teknologi terkini untuk memastikan bahwa kami selalu satu langkah di depan dalam menyediakan produk dan layanan yang efektif. Name: ZEBCO Heating
Description:
ZEBCO is the zero emission boiler company.

Our mission is to decarbonise homes and lower domestic energy consumption. 

ZEBCO Heating is a start up which develops low cost, low carbon retrofit heating systems. ZEBCO is a pioneer in the use of catalytic heating technology in heating systems. This technology eliminates carbon emissions, reduces energy consumption and is hydrogen ready.

Our mission is to accelerate the transition to a cleaner future by replacing combustion technology with oxidisation technology. We believe that the adoption of oxidisation technology to replace combustion technology is a quicker, cleaner, cheaper and safer option for the UK.

The company has been supported with an Innovate grant on its journey to scaling to contribute to the net zero target, while supporting those on lower incomes heat their homes more efficiently.
