Description:
Big Gas Plumbing Services
Precision. Performance. Plumbing that Works.

At Big Gas Plumbing Services, we deliver high-performance mechanical and plumbing solutions with a focus on system integrity, efficiency, and longevity. With deep expertise across residential, commercial, and industrial applications, we design and implement custom systems that perform reliably for years to come.

Our Core Services:

Hydronic Heating Systems
From radiant floor heating to rooftop solar thermal, geo-exchange, and air-to-water solutions, we specialize in complete hydronic system design and installation. Our focus on both function and design ensures consistent performance and long-term reliability.

Steam Heating Solutions
With experience in both low and high-pressure systems, we work with vintage residential steam setups as well as complex commercial and industrial applications. We also handle boiler inspections and custom steam process designs across sectors including food, beverage, plastics, and metal industries.

Thermal Fluid Boiler Systems
We provide layout planning and installation of thermal oil heating systems for industrial processes requiring precise, high-temperature fluid heat transfer.

Potable Water & Drainage Systems (Plumbing: Water Supply & DWV)
From initial concept to final implementation, we design, modify, and install complete potable water and DWV systems for residential and commercial buildings. Our projects are grounded in code compliance, durability, and practical design.

Class A Gas Technician Services
As a fully licensed Class A Gas Technician, we offer comprehensive natural gas and propane equipment services. We handle everything from equipment design and commissioning to installation and venting systems, including the registration of imported gas appliances.

Newcastle heating and plumbing Ltd is one of the UK’s most trusted suppliers of boiler spare parts, offering both brand-new and expertly refurbished boiler components. With a proud history spanning over 20 years, we specialise in sourcing, remanufacturing, and supplying high-quality parts to customers all across the UK.

Our refurbished parts are at the heart of our business. By giving new life to previously discarded components, we’ve helped reduce waste and environmental impact, making heating solutions more sustainable and affordable for everyone. Every refurbished part undergoes rigorous testing to ensure reliability and performance.

We are driven by a simple goal—to help customers find the right part, at the right price, with the best service. With over 15,000 spare parts in stock and ready for immediate dispatch, we can supply almost any boiler part on demand.

Whether you’re looking for cost-effective solutions or brand-new parts, www.heatingandcateringparts.com is your go-to partner for quality, value, and dependable service.

Name: ÇAYISI - Güneş Enerjisi, Kat Kalorifer Kazan ve Sobaları, Pelet Kazan ve Sobaları, Isı Pompaları
Description:
ÇAYISI, yenilenebilir enerji sistemleri ve ileri düzey ısıtma-soğutma teknolojileri alanında hizmet sunan mühendislik firmasıdır. Güneş enerjili su ısıtıcıları, kat kaloriferi kazanları, pelet soba ve kazanlar, inverter ısı pompaları, LPG ve doğalgaz sobaları, elektrikli ısıtıcılar ve merkezi sistem çözümleriyle hem bireysel hem endüstriyel ihtiyaçlara sürdürülebilir çözümler geliştiriyoruz. Bursa merkezli firmamız, Türkiye’nin 81 iline ürün gönderimi, yerinde keşif ve satış sonrası teknik destek sağlamaktadır. Ayrıca Almanya, Azerbaycan, Bulgaristan, Irak, Gürcistan gibi birçok ülkeye ihracat gerçekleştirerek yurt dışında da aktif faaliyet göstermekteyiz.

Her projeye özel mühendislik hizmetleri sunuyor, enerji verimliliği esaslı çözümler geliştiriyoruz. Ürün portföyümüzde vakum tüplü güneş enerji sistemleri, otomatik ve manuel katı yakıtlı kazanlar, sessiz ve verimli pelet sistemleri, dört mevsim konfor sağlayan inverter ısı pompaları ve akıllı kontrol panelleri bulunmaktadır. Villa, apartman, otel, sera, çiftlik, fabrika ve sosyal tesis gibi yapılara özel sistemler kuruyoruz.

ÇAYISI olarak hedefimiz, doğaya saygılı, düşük enerji tüketimli, uzun ömürlü sistemlerle kullanıcıların konforunu artırmak ve enerji maliyetlerini düşürmektir. Her müşterimiz için proje bazlı çözümler geliştiriyor, keşiften montaja kadar tüm süreci yönetiyor, yüksek memnuniyet sağlayan sistemler kuruyoruz. Teknoloji, mühendislik ve çevre bilincini bir araya getirerek geleceği ısıtıyoruz.

Name: Healthy Waterman
Description:
Healthy Water Man offers whole-house water filtration systems designed to mimic the natural hydrological cycle of the earth. Our product allows homeowners to enjoy the benefits of great-tasting healthy mineral water from every faucet in their homes.

We go down to less than three microns of suspended solids, sediments, turbidity, organics, iron manganese, hydrogen sulfites, arsenic, radium, and radionuclide.

Currently, several water systems are being sold to the public, including whole-house filtration systems, purification systems, fluoride filters, reverse osmosis systems, water treatment systems and filters, and more. Most don’t produce healthy water, which is why you should do diligent research on the system you choose. You must know what to look for, and we hope to help you learn exactly what you need.

Name: Ontario Medical Gas
Description:
Ontario Medical Gas provides medical gas hardware and project management to hospitals, surgical facilities, hyperbaric oxygen treatment centers, and dental offices in Canada and the United States. We are proud partners of Amico and other industry leaders in medical equipment manufacturing.

HOSPITAL SYSTEMS
Our medical gas systems include an array of valves: service valves, check valves, combination zone valve alarms, copper pipe, alarm systems, medical gas outlets (Oxygen, Medical Air, Nitrous Oxide, Instrument Air), manifolds, zone indicator panel assemblies, gas control panels, emergency oxygen inlet stations, retro-fit conversions, medical vacuum systems, and various other medical air systems.

Our headwall and bedhead trunking unit options include horizontal bed head units, console units and security recessed console boxes, surface mounted headwalls, complete room setups, and patient room lighting.

SURGICAL EQUIPMENT
We offer a full suite of solutions and medical gas systems for operating rooms and surgical facilities both for public and private facilities.  

HYPERBARIC OXYGEN
We provide control systems, oxygen concentrators, and pressure gauges with advanced technology and precise control to craft reliable, efficient, and safe hyperbaric treatment systems.

DENTAL EQUIPMENT
Our dental outlet assembly fits the tight spaces and cabinets typical of dental treatment areas. Oxygen, nitrous, and Medvac all have their own outlets, enabling simple repairs without removing the entire assembly.

Our experienced staff can help you with all of your medical gas equipment needs. You can reach us at 416-400-4664 or email quotes@ontariomedicalgas.com to discuss your project.

Name: Jörfi ehf
Description:
Jörfi ehf. er öflugt íslenskt þjónustufyrirtæki og verslun staðsett á Akranesi, sem sérhæfir sig í pípulögnum, véltækni, drenlausnum og tæknilegri ráðgjöf. Með löggiltum pípulagninga- og vélvirkjameistara innanborðs bjóðum við upp á faglega og áreiðanlega þjónustu fyrir einstaklinga, fyrirtæki og stofnanir.

Við sinnum fjölbreyttum verkefnum á sviði gólfhitakerfa, dæluþjónustu, fráveitukerfa, úttektar og eftirlits. Við leggjum mikla áherslu á sérsniðnar lausnir og veitum faglega ráðgjöf við val og hönnun búnaðar og kerfa sem henta aðstæðum hvers viðskiptavinar.

Auk verkþjónustu rekur Jörfi ehf. einnig fagverslun, þar sem við bjóðum upp á úrval hágæða vara í gegnum umboðssölu fyrir ÍSRÖR og Hringás, ásamt samstarfi við Hydroscand á Íslandi. Þannig tryggjum við að viðskiptavinir okkar hafi aðgang að fyrsta flokks efni og búnaði, hvort sem er til eigin nota eða í gegnum þjónustu okkar.

Jörfi ehf. byggir á sterkum grunni fagmennsku, nákvæmni og persónulegrar þjónustu — með skýra framtíðarsýn um að veita heildarlausnir og byggja upp traust, langvarandi sambönd við sína viðskiptavini.

Name: Military Plumbing, LLC
Description:
Military Plumbing is a trusted, family-owned business delivering expert 24/7 plumbing services throughout North Texas. Serving a wide range of locations—including Allen, TX; Caddo Mills, TX; The Colony, TX; Commerce, TX; Carrollton, TX; Dallas, TX; Flower Mound, TX; Forney, TX; Frisco, TX; Garland, TX; Greenville, TX; Heath, TX; Highland Park, TX; Lewisville, TX; McKinney, TX; Mesquite, TX; Plano, TX; Richardson, TX; Rockwall, TX; Rowlett, TX; Royse City, TX; Sulphur Springs, TX; Sunnyvale, TX; Terrell, TX; University Park, TX; and Wylie, TX—Military Plumbing is the go-to plumber for residential and commercial needs.

Founded on the principles of integrity, efficiency, loyalty, and quality, Military Plumbing honors the legacy of military service by upholding the highest standards in every project. The company’s experienced team of licensed professionals is equipped with state-of-the-art tools and technology to handle any plumbing challenge, from routine maintenance to emergency repairs. Whether it’s drain cleaning, sewer repair, leak detection, water heater installation, slab leak repair, or gas line services, Military Plumbing provides reliable solutions designed to keep homes and businesses running smoothly.

In addition to core plumbing services, Military Plumbing excels in repairing and installing fixtures such as toilets, showers, faucets, and garbage disposals, ensuring every element of a plumbing system functions flawlessly. The company also offers advanced water filtration and softener systems to enhance water quality and protect plumbing infrastructure over time. With a strong focus on customer satisfaction, Military Plumbing responds promptly to emergencies and offers dependable, round-the-clock service for those unexpected moments.

Military Plumbing’s commitment to excellence and community is reflected in the glowing reviews from countless satisfied customers.

Description:
Basée au cœur de notre belle région, Provence Plomberie Dépannage est votre partenaire de confiance pour toutes les interventions liées à l’eau et au chauffage. Que vous soyez un particulier ou un professionnel, nous mettons notre savoir-faire artisanal au service de la durabilité de vos installations.

 Nos Domaines d’Intervention

Nous couvrons un large éventail de services, allant de l'urgence absolue à l'amélioration de votre habitat :

Dépannage d’Urgence : Recherche et réparation de fuites (apparentes ou encastrées), débouchage de canalisations, et remise en étanchéité immédiate.

Installation & Rénovation : Création complète de salles de bains, pose de robinetterie haut de gamme, et modernisation de vos réseaux d'évacuation.

Chauffage & Eau Chaude : Installation, entretien et remplacement de chauffe-eau (électrique et thermodynamique) et de radiateurs.

Traitement de l'Eau : Pose d'adoucisseurs pour protéger vos appareils et prolonger la vie de vos canalisations contre le calcaire provençal.

 Pourquoi nous choisir ?

Faire appel à Provence Plomberie Dépannage, c'est choisir la tranquillité d'esprit grâce à des engagements concrets :

Réactivité Record : Parce qu'une fuite n'attend pas, nous intervenons dans les plus brefs délais pour limiter les dégâts des eaux.

Transparence Totale : Chaque intervention fait l'objet d'un diagnostic précis et d'un devis clair avant travaux. Pas de mauvaises surprises sur la facture.

Qualité Artisanale : Nous utilisons des matériaux certifiés et durables pour garantir la pérennité de nos réparations.

Proximité : Une entreprise à taille humaine qui connaît son territoire et ses clients.

 Zone d'intervention

Nous rayonnons sur l'ensemble de la région  d'Aix-en-Provence, Marseille aux alentours pour vous offrir un service de proximité ultra-rapide.

Name: American Leak Detection of N Alabama
İstanbul Kombi Tamiri Servisi
Description:
İstanbul Kombi Tamiri Servisi, tüm marka ve model kombilerde uzman teknik destek sağlayan profesyonel bir servistir. Deneyimli ekiplerimiz, kombi arızalarını hızlı şekilde tespit eder ve kalıcı çözümler sunar. Hedefimiz, müşterilerimizin evlerinde veya iş yerlerinde kesintisiz sıcak su ve ısınma konforunu sağlamaktır.

Kombiniz çalışmıyor, suyu ısıtmıyor veya ses çıkarıyorsa, arızayı ertelemeden profesyonel destek almanız gerekir. İstanbul genelinde her semte en kısa sürede ulaşan mobil servis araçlarımızla, aynı gün içinde kombi onarım hizmeti sunuyoruz. Arıza tespitinden parça değişimine kadar tüm işlemler orijinal yedek parça garantisi ile yapılır.

Kombi bakımı sadece arızaları önlemekle kalmaz, aynı zamanda cihazın ömrünü uzatır ve enerji tasarrufu sağlar. Düzenli bakım yaptırılan kombiler, yüzde 20’ye varan yakıt tasarrufu sunar. Bu nedenle yılda en az bir kez kombi bakımını ihmal etmemenizi öneriyoruz. Servisimiz, bakım sırasında filtre temizliği, gaz ayarı, su basıncı kontrolü, baca çekiş testi ve genel performans ölçümü yaparak kombinizin güvenli çalışmasını sağlar.

İstanbul Kombi Tamiri Servisi olarak yalnızca bakım ve onarım değil, kombi montajı, değişimi ve petek temizliği hizmeti de sunmaktayız. Yeni kombi kurulumu sırasında gaz bağlantısı ve tesisat güvenliği kontrolleri titizlikle yapılır. Petek temizliği ile ısı verimliliği artırılır, yakıt tüketimi azalır.

Vaillant, Bosch, Demirdöküm, ECA, Ariston, Baymak, Buderus, Viessmann, Ferroli, Alarko, Protherm, Warmhaus, Arçelik ve diğer tüm markalarda servis hizmeti veriyoruz.
İstanbul’un tüm ilçelerinde — Avrupa ve Anadolu yakasında — 7/24 teknik destek sağlıyoruz.

Hızlı servis, uygun fiyat ve garantili işçilik politikamızla kombi sorunlarınıza kalıcı çözümler üretiyoruz.
İstanbul Kombi Tamiri Servisi, güvenilir hizmet anlayışıyla her zaman yanınızda!

Name: Alvarez Plumbing Salinas
Description:
Alvarez Plumbing is a trusted, locally owned plumbing company serving Salinas, CA, and the greater Monterey Bay Area for over 35 years. Founded and led by Chris Pentz, our mission is simple: deliver honest, high-quality plumbing solutions with integrity, speed, and unmatched local expertise.

We specialize in a full range of residential and commercial plumbing services including emergency plumbing, water heater installation and repair, hydro jetting, re-piping, backflow prevention, and video camera inspections. Our team is fully certified, experienced, and committed to solving both everyday issues and complex plumbing challenges with care and professionalism.

As the plumbing industry faces major shifts—from aging infrastructure and water heater electrification to smart leak detection and stricter regulations—Alvarez Plumbing stays ahead of the curve. We guide homeowners through critical upgrades (like lead pipe replacements or heat pump water heater conversions), help businesses maintain compliance, and offer 24/7 emergency service when disaster strikes.

What sets us apart is our transparent pricing, honest assessments (no upselling), and true local know-how. Our technicians live and work in the same neighborhoods we serve, so we understand the unique plumbing concerns of Salinas and the Monterey Bay—from hard water damage to mid-century home repipes.

We combine the reliability of a big company with the personal touch of a family-owned business. Our customers choose Alvarez Plumbing not just for what we fix, but for how we make them feel—safe, informed, and respected.

Name: Everflow Industrial Supply Group
Description:
Everflow began in the workshops and alleyway foundries of Changhua, Taiwan, where generations of craftsmen shaped Taiwan’s manufacturing base. Over 40 years Everflow has grown into a vertically integrated global manufacturer serving the plumbing, hardware, and OEM/ODM industries with reliable quality, engineering capability, and supply-chain performance.

Today, Everflow operates factories across greater Asia—including Shanghai, Quanzhou, Xiamen, Vietnam, and Thailand—offering scalable production, multi-country sourcing, and competitive lead times. Our capabilities include forging, gravity casting, precision machining, plastic injection molding, blow molding, tooling design, engineering development, and OEM/ODM manufacturing.

We supply plumbing products for the U.S. and Canada, including faucets, repair kits, waste kits, bathroom accessories, plastic pipe and fittings, brass fittings, tubular assemblies (P-traps, J-bends), supply lines, braided connectors, angle valves, stop valves, and pipe clamps. We also produce custom-engineered components that meet North American performance and safety requirements.

Our products comply with U.S. and Canadian standards, including UPC, cUPC, NSF/ANSI 61, NSF/ANSI 372, WaterSense, ASME A112, CSA B125, and lead-free regulations. We work with accredited certification agencies to ensure materials, processes, and assemblies meet regulatory expectations, enabling products to be ready for distribution and installation.

We support distributors, wholesalers, retailers, and OEM/ODM partners with stable multi-factory production, quality assurance, and supply-chain communication. Our engineering teams collaborate with customers to optimize design, manufacturability, and compliance from concept to production.

From our beginnings in Taiwan to our global footprint, Everflow remains committed to craftsmanship, compliance, innovation, and long-term partnership—delivering certified, engineered solutions that help customers grow.

Description:
About Home Ventilation Services

 Empowering Your Spaces with Cleaner Air and Optimal Comfort! 

Welcome to Home Ventilation Services – Your Trusted Partner in creating healthier, energy-efficient environments for businesses, educational institutions, and homes.

 Our Mission:
To deliver top-notch ventilation and heating solutions tailored to your unique needs. With our friendly, efficient service, we ensure every installation is seamless, enhancing your space's air quality and comfort.

 What We Offer:

Free Quotations & Expert Advice: We believe in transparency and value. Our skilled team provides FREE, no-obligation quotes and insights, guiding you to the best solutions.
Quality Installations: Years of trade experience back us. We adhere to the highest standards, ensuring each installation is flawless.
Safety and Compliance: Your safety is our priority. We provide an Electrical Compliance Certificate post-installation and activate the relevant 5/6-year warranty for peace of mind.

 Ventilation Systems:
Our Smart Vent Positive Pressure systems revolutionise indoor air quality. We draw fresher, drier air into your space, filter it through high-efficiency systems, and expel moisture-laden, stale air. This not only combats condensation, mould, and mildew but also creates a healthier living environment. We also offer balanced pressure systems tailored to specific needs.

 Heat Pump Specialists:
